Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(************************************************************************

 Limits and colimits in the iso-comma category

 Contents
 1. Terminal objects
 2. Products
 3. Pullbacks
 4. Initial objects
 5. Coproducts

 ************************************************************************)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.IsoCommaCategory.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Terminal.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinProducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Pullbacks.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Initial.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinCoproducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Preservation.

Local Open Scope cat.

Section IsoCommaLimits.
  Context {C₁ C₂ C₃ : category}
          (F : C₁ ⟶ C₃)
          (G : C₂ ⟶ C₃).

  (**
   1. Terminal objects
   *)
  Section TerminalObject.
    Context (HF : preserves_terminal F)
            (HG : preserves_terminal G).

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_terminal F
HG: preserves_terminal G
x: iso_comma F G
H₁: isTerminal C₁ (pr11 x)
H₂: isTerminal C₂ (pr21 x)
isTerminal (iso_comma F G) x

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_terminal F
HG: preserves_terminal G
x: iso_comma F G
H₁: isTerminal C₁ (pr11 x)
H₂: isTerminal C₂ (pr21 x)
isTerminal (iso_comma F G) x

      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_terminal F
HG: preserves_terminal G
x: iso_comma F G
H₁: isTerminal C₁ (pr11 x)
H₂: isTerminal C₂ (pr21 x)
w: iso_comma F G
iscontr (iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧)

      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_terminal F
HG: preserves_terminal G
x: iso_comma F G
H₁: isTerminal C₁ (pr11 x)
H₂: isTerminal C₂ (pr21 x)
w: iso_comma F G
isaprop (iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧)
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_terminal F
HG: preserves_terminal G
x: iso_comma F G
H₁: isTerminal C₁ (pr11 x)
H₂: isTerminal C₂ (pr21 x)
w: iso_comma F G
iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧

      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_terminal F
HG: preserves_terminal G
x: iso_comma F G
H₁: isTerminal C₁ (pr11 x)
H₂: isTerminal C₂ (pr21 x)
w: iso_comma F G
isaprop (iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧)
 abstract
          (use invproofirrelevance ;
           intros φ₁ φ₂ ;
           use eq_iso_comma_mor ;
           [ apply (@TerminalArrowEq _ (make_Terminal _ H₁))
           | apply (@TerminalArrowEq _ (make_Terminal _ H₂)) ]).
      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_terminal F
HG: preserves_terminal G
x: iso_comma F G
H₁: isTerminal C₁ (pr11 x)
H₂: isTerminal C₂ (pr21 x)
w: iso_comma F G
iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
 
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_terminal F
HG: preserves_terminal G
x: iso_comma F G
H₁: isTerminal C₁ (pr11 x)
H₂: isTerminal C₂ (pr21 x)
w: iso_comma F G
Core.mor_disp (pr2 w) (pr2 x)
  (TerminalArrow (pr11 x,, H₁) (pr11 w),,
   TerminalArrow (pr21 x,, H₂) (pr21 w))

        apply (@TerminalArrowEq _ (make_Terminal _ (HG _ H₂))).
    Defined.

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_terminal F
HG: preserves_terminal G
T₁: Terminal C₁
T₂: Terminal C₂
Terminal (iso_comma F G)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_terminal F
HG: preserves_terminal G
T₁: Terminal C₁
T₂: Terminal C₂
Terminal (iso_comma F G)

      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_terminal F
HG: preserves_terminal G
T₁: Terminal C₁
T₂: Terminal C₂
iso_comma F G
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_terminal F
HG: preserves_terminal G
T₁: Terminal C₁
T₂: Terminal C₂
(λ a : iso_comma F G, isTerminal (iso_comma F G) a)
  ?pr1

      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_terminal F
HG: preserves_terminal G
T₁: Terminal C₁
T₂: Terminal C₂
iso_comma F G
 
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_terminal F
HG: preserves_terminal G
T₁: Terminal C₁
T₂: Terminal C₂
z_iso (F (pr1 T₁)) (G (pr1 T₂))

        exact (z_iso_Terminals
                 (make_Terminal _ (HF _ (pr2 T₁)))
                 (make_Terminal _ (HG _ (pr2 T₂)))).
      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_terminal F
HG: preserves_terminal G
T₁: Terminal C₁
T₂: Terminal C₂
(λ a : iso_comma F G, isTerminal (iso_comma F G) a)
  ((pr1 T₁,, pr1 T₂),,
   (z_iso_Terminals
      (make_Terminal (F (pr1 T₁))
         (HF (pr1 T₁) (pr2 T₁)))
      (make_Terminal (G (pr1 T₂))
         (HG (pr1 T₂) (pr2 T₂)))
    :
    Core.ob_disp
      (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
         (Core.disp_cat_data_from_disp_cat
            (iso_comma_disp_cat F G)))
      (pr1 T₁,, pr1 T₂)))
 
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_terminal F
HG: preserves_terminal G
T₁: Terminal C₁
T₂: Terminal C₂
isTerminal C₁
  (pr11 ((pr1 T₁,, pr1 T₂),,
         z_iso_Terminals
           (make_Terminal (F (pr1 T₁))
              (HF (pr1 T₁) (pr2 T₁)))
           (make_Terminal (G (pr1 T₂))
              (HG (pr1 T₂) (pr2 T₂)))))
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_terminal F
HG: preserves_terminal G
T₁: Terminal C₁
T₂: Terminal C₂
isTerminal C₂
  (pr21 ((pr1 T₁,, pr1 T₂),,
         z_iso_Terminals
           (make_Terminal (F (pr1 T₁))
              (HF (pr1 T₁) (pr2 T₁)))
           (make_Terminal (G (pr1 T₂))
              (HG (pr1 T₂) (pr2 T₂)))))

        
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_terminal F
HG: preserves_terminal G
T₁: Terminal C₁
T₂: Terminal C₂
isTerminal C₁
  (pr11 ((pr1 T₁,, pr1 T₂),,
         z_iso_Terminals
           (make_Terminal (F (pr1 T₁))
              (HF (pr1 T₁) (pr2 T₁)))
           (make_Terminal (G (pr1 T₂))
              (HG (pr1 T₂) (pr2 T₂)))))
 exact (pr2 T₁).
        
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_terminal F
HG: preserves_terminal G
T₁: Terminal C₁
T₂: Terminal C₂
isTerminal C₂
  (pr21 ((pr1 T₁,, pr1 T₂),,
         z_iso_Terminals
           (make_Terminal (F (pr1 T₁))
              (HF (pr1 T₁) (pr2 T₁)))
           (make_Terminal (G (pr1 T₂))
              (HG (pr1 T₂) (pr2 T₂)))))
 exact (pr2 T₂).
    Defined.

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_terminal F
HG: preserves_terminal G
T₁: Terminal C₁
T₂: Terminal C₂
preserves_terminal (iso_comma_pr1 F G)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_terminal F
HG: preserves_terminal G
T₁: Terminal C₁
T₂: Terminal C₂
preserves_terminal (iso_comma_pr1 F G)

      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_terminal F
HG: preserves_terminal G
T₁: Terminal C₁
T₂: Terminal C₂
preserves_chosen_terminal
  (terminal_category_iso_comma T₁ T₂)
  (iso_comma_pr1 F G)

      exact (pr2 T₁).
    Defined.

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_terminal F
HG: preserves_terminal G
T₁: Terminal C₁
T₂: Terminal C₂
preserves_terminal (iso_comma_pr2 F G)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_terminal F
HG: preserves_terminal G
T₁: Terminal C₁
T₂: Terminal C₂
preserves_terminal (iso_comma_pr2 F G)

      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_terminal F
HG: preserves_terminal G
T₁: Terminal C₁
T₂: Terminal C₂
preserves_chosen_terminal
  (terminal_category_iso_comma T₁ T₂)
  (iso_comma_pr2 F G)

      exact (pr2 T₂).
    Defined.

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_terminal F
HG: preserves_terminal G
C₀: category
H₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
HH₁: preserves_terminal H₁
H₂: C₀ ⟶ C₂
HH₂: preserves_terminal H₂
α: nat_z_iso (H₁ ∙ F) (H₂ ∙ G)
preserves_terminal (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_terminal F
HG: preserves_terminal G
C₀: category
H₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
HH₁: preserves_terminal H₁
H₂: C₀ ⟶ C₂
HH₂: preserves_terminal H₂
α: nat_z_iso (H₁ ∙ F) (H₂ ∙ G)
preserves_terminal (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α)

      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_terminal F
HG: preserves_terminal G
C₀: category
H₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
HH₁: preserves_terminal H₁
H₂: C₀ ⟶ C₂
HH₂: preserves_terminal H₂
α: nat_z_iso (H₁ ∙ F) (H₂ ∙ G)
x: C₀
Hx: isTerminal C₀ x
isTerminal (iso_comma F G)
  (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α x)

      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_terminal F
HG: preserves_terminal G
C₀: category
H₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
HH₁: preserves_terminal H₁
H₂: C₀ ⟶ C₂
HH₂: preserves_terminal H₂
α: nat_z_iso (H₁ ∙ F) (H₂ ∙ G)
x: C₀
Hx: isTerminal C₀ x
isTerminal C₁ (pr11 (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α x))
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_terminal F
HG: preserves_terminal G
C₀: category
H₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
HH₁: preserves_terminal H₁
H₂: C₀ ⟶ C₂
HH₂: preserves_terminal H₂
α: nat_z_iso (H₁ ∙ F) (H₂ ∙ G)
x: C₀
Hx: isTerminal C₀ x
isTerminal C₂ (pr21 (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α x))

      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_terminal F
HG: preserves_terminal G
C₀: category
H₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
HH₁: preserves_terminal H₁
H₂: C₀ ⟶ C₂
HH₂: preserves_terminal H₂
α: nat_z_iso (H₁ ∙ F) (H₂ ∙ G)
x: C₀
Hx: isTerminal C₀ x
isTerminal C₁ (pr11 (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α x))
 
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_terminal F
HG: preserves_terminal G
C₀: category
H₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
HH₁: preserves_terminal H₁
H₂: C₀ ⟶ C₂
HH₂: preserves_terminal H₂
α: nat_z_iso (H₁ ∙ F) (H₂ ∙ G)
x: C₀
Hx: isTerminal C₀ x
isTerminal C₀ x

        exact Hx.
      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_terminal F
HG: preserves_terminal G
C₀: category
H₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
HH₁: preserves_terminal H₁
H₂: C₀ ⟶ C₂
HH₂: preserves_terminal H₂
α: nat_z_iso (H₁ ∙ F) (H₂ ∙ G)
x: C₀
Hx: isTerminal C₀ x
isTerminal C₂ (pr21 (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α x))
 
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_terminal F
HG: preserves_terminal G
C₀: category
H₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
HH₁: preserves_terminal H₁
H₂: C₀ ⟶ C₂
HH₂: preserves_terminal H₂
α: nat_z_iso (H₁ ∙ F) (H₂ ∙ G)
x: C₀
Hx: isTerminal C₀ x
isTerminal C₀ x

        exact Hx.
    Defined.
  End TerminalObject.

  (**
   2. Products
   *)
  Section Product.
    Context (HF : preserves_binproduct F)
            (HG : preserves_binproduct G).

    Section IsProductInIsoComma.
      Context {x y z : iso_comma F G}
              (p₁ : z --> x)
              (p₂ : z --> y)
              (H₁ : isBinProduct _ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z) (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂))
              (H₂ : isBinProduct _ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z) (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂)).

      Let P₁ : BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) := make_BinProduct _ _ _ _ _ _ H₁.
      Let P₂ : BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) := make_BinProduct _ _ _ _ _ _ H₂.

      Section UMP.
        Context {w : iso_comma F G}
                (f : w --> x)
                (g : w --> y).

        
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
p₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, y ⟧
H₁: isBinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂)
H₂: isBinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂)
P₁:= make_BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂) H₁: BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂) H₂: BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
isaprop
  (∑ fg : iso_comma F G ⟦ w, z ⟧,
   fg · p₁ = f × fg · p₂ = g)

        
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
p₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, y ⟧
H₁: isBinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂)
H₂: isBinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂)
P₁:= make_BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂) H₁: BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂) H₂: BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
isaprop
  (∑ fg : iso_comma F G ⟦ w, z ⟧,
   fg · p₁ = f × fg · p₂ = g)

          
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
p₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, y ⟧
H₁: isBinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂)
H₂: isBinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂)
P₁:= make_BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂) H₁: BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂) H₂: BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
isProofIrrelevant
  (∑ fg : iso_comma F G ⟦ w, z ⟧,
   fg · p₁ = f × fg · p₂ = g)

          
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
p₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, y ⟧
H₁: isBinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂)
H₂: isBinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂)
P₁:= make_BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂) H₁: BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂) H₂: BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ fg : iso_comma F G ⟦ w, z ⟧,
fg · p₁ = f × fg · p₂ = g
φ₁ = φ₂

          
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
p₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, y ⟧
H₁: isBinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂)
H₂: isBinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂)
P₁:= make_BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂) H₁: BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂) H₂: BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ fg : iso_comma F G ⟦ w, z ⟧,
fg · p₁ = f × fg · p₂ = g
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : iso_comma F G ⟦ w, z ⟧,
   x0 · p₁ = f × x0 · p₂ = g)
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
p₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, y ⟧
H₁: isBinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂)
H₂: isBinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂)
P₁:= make_BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂) H₁: BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂) H₂: BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ fg : iso_comma F G ⟦ w, z ⟧,
fg · p₁ = f × fg · p₂ = g
pr1 φ₁ = pr1 φ₂

G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G

  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂)
H₂: isBinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂)

  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂) H₁: BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂) H₂: BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ fg : iso_comma F G ⟦ w, z ⟧,
fg · p₁ = f × fg · p₂ = g
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : iso_comma F G ⟦ w, z ⟧,
   x0 · p₁ = f × x0 · p₂ = g)

            
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
p₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, y ⟧
H₁: isBinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂)
H₂: isBinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂)
P₁:= make_BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂) H₁: BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂) H₂: BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ fg : iso_comma F G ⟦ w, z ⟧,
fg · p₁ = f × fg · p₂ = g
x0: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, z ⟧
isaprop (x0 · p₁ = f × x0 · p₂ = g)

            apply isapropdirprod ; apply homset_property.

HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G

p₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, y ⟧

  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂)

  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂)

φ₁, φ₂: ∑ fg : iso_comma F G ⟦ w, z ⟧,

C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
p₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, y ⟧
H₁: isBinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂)
H₂: isBinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂)
P₁:= make_BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂) H₁: BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂) H₂: BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ fg : iso_comma F G ⟦ w, z ⟧,
fg · p₁ = f × fg · p₂ = g
pr111 φ₁ · BinProductPr1 C₁ P₁ =
pr111 φ₂ · BinProductPr1 C₁ P₁
 exact (maponpaths (λ z, pr11 z) (pr12 φ₁)
                     @ !(maponpaths (λ z, pr11 z) (pr12 φ₂))).

C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G

p₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, y ⟧

  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂)
H₂: isBinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂)

  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂) H₁: BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)

f: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ fg : iso_comma F G ⟦ w, z ⟧,
fg · p₁ = f × fg · p₂ = g
pr211 φ₁ · BinProductPr2 C₂ P₂ =
pr211 φ₂ · BinProductPr2 C₂ P₂
 exact (maponpaths (λ z, dirprod_pr2 (pr1 z)) (pr22 φ₁)
                     @ !(maponpaths (λ z, dirprod_pr2 (pr1 z)) (pr22 φ₂))).
        Qed.

        
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
p₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, y ⟧
H₁: isBinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂)
H₂: isBinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂)
P₁:= make_BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂) H₁: BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂) H₂: BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
iso_comma F G ⟦ w, z ⟧

        
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
p₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, y ⟧
H₁: isBinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂)
H₂: isBinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂)
P₁:= make_BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂) H₁: BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂) H₂: BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
iso_comma F G ⟦ w, z ⟧

F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G

p₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, y ⟧
H₁: isBinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂)
H₂: isBinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂)
P₁:= make_BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂) H₁: BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂) H₂: BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)

f: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
C₁ ⟦ pr11 w, pr11 z ⟧

C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
p₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, y ⟧
H₁: isBinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂)
H₂: isBinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂)
P₁:= make_BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂) H₁: BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂) H₂: BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
# F ?Goal · pr2 z = pr2 w · # G ?Goal0

          
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
p₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, y ⟧
H₁: isBinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂)
H₂: isBinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂)
P₁:= make_BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂) H₁: BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂) H₂: BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
C₁ ⟦ pr11 w, pr11 z ⟧
 exact (BinProductArrow _ P₁ (pr11 f) (pr11 g)).

  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂)

C₂ ⟦ pr21 w, pr21 z ⟧
 exact (BinProductArrow _ P₂ (pr21 f) (pr21 g)).
          
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
p₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, y ⟧
H₁: isBinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂)
H₂: isBinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂)
P₁:= make_BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂) H₁: BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)

  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂) H₂: BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
# F (BinProductArrow C₁ P₁ (pr11 f) (pr11 g)) · pr2 z =
pr2 w · # G (BinProductArrow C₂ P₂ (pr21 f) (pr21 g))
 
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
p₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, y ⟧
H₁: isBinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂)
H₂: isBinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂)
P₁:= make_BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂) H₁: BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂) H₂: BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
# F (BinProductArrow C₁ P₁ (pr11 f) (pr11 g)) · pr2 z
· # G (pr21 p₁) =
pr2 w · # G (BinProductArrow C₂ P₂ (pr21 f) (pr21 g))
· # G (pr21 p₁)
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
p₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, y ⟧
H₁: isBinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂)
H₂: isBinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂)
P₁:= make_BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂) H₁: BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂) H₂: BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
# F (BinProductArrow C₁ P₁ (pr11 f) (pr11 g)) · pr2 z
· # G (pr21 p₂) =
pr2 w · # G (BinProductArrow C₂ P₂ (pr21 f) (pr21 g))
· # G (pr21 p₂)

            
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
p₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, y ⟧
H₁: isBinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂)
H₂: isBinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂)
P₁:= make_BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂) H₁: BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂) H₂: BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
# F (BinProductArrow C₁ P₁ (pr11 f) (pr11 g)) · pr2 z
· # G (pr21 p₁) =
pr2 w · # G (BinProductArrow C₂ P₂ (pr21 f) (pr21 g))
· # G (pr21 p₁)
 abstract
                (rewrite !assoc' ;
                 rewrite <- functor_comp ;
                 rewrite (BinProductPr1Commutes _ _ _ P₂) ;
                 refine (_ @ pr2 f) ;
                 refine (!(maponpaths (λ z, _ · z) (pr2 p₁)) @ _) ;
                 rewrite !assoc ;
                 rewrite <- functor_comp ;
                 rewrite (BinProductPr1Commutes _ _ _ P₁) ;
                 apply idpath).
            
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
p₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, y ⟧
H₁: isBinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂)
H₂: isBinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂)
P₁:= make_BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂) H₁: BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂) H₂: BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
# F (BinProductArrow C₁ P₁ (pr11 f) (pr11 g)) · pr2 z
· # G (pr21 p₂) =
pr2 w · # G (BinProductArrow C₂ P₂ (pr21 f) (pr21 g))
· # G (pr21 p₂)
 abstract
                (rewrite !assoc' ;
                 rewrite <- functor_comp ;
                 rewrite (BinProductPr2Commutes _ _ _ P₂) ;
                 refine (_ @ pr2 g) ;
                 refine (!(maponpaths (λ z, _ · z) (pr2 p₂)) @ _) ;
                 rewrite !assoc ;
                 rewrite <- functor_comp ;
                 rewrite (BinProductPr2Commutes _ _ _ P₁) ;
                 apply idpath).
        Defined.

        
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
p₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, y ⟧
H₁: isBinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂)
H₂: isBinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂)
P₁:= make_BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂) H₁: BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂) H₂: BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
isBinProduct_in_iso_comma_ump · p₁ = f

        
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
p₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, y ⟧
H₁: isBinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂)
H₂: isBinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂)
P₁:= make_BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂) H₁: BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂) H₂: BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
isBinProduct_in_iso_comma_ump · p₁ = f

          
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
p₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, y ⟧
H₁: isBinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂)
H₂: isBinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂)
P₁:= make_BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂) H₁: BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂) H₂: BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
BinProductArrow C₁ P₁ (pr11 f) (pr11 g) · pr11 p₁ =
pr11 f
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
p₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, y ⟧
H₁: isBinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂)
H₂: isBinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂)
P₁:= make_BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂) H₁: BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂) H₂: BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
BinProductArrow C₂ P₂ (pr21 f) (pr21 g) · pr21 p₁ =
pr21 f

          
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
p₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, y ⟧
H₁: isBinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂)
H₂: isBinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂)
P₁:= make_BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂) H₁: BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂) H₂: BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
BinProductArrow C₁ P₁ (pr11 f) (pr11 g) · pr11 p₁ =
pr11 f
 apply (BinProductPr1Commutes _ _ _ P₁).
          
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
p₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, y ⟧
H₁: isBinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂)
H₂: isBinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂)
P₁:= make_BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂) H₁: BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂) H₂: BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
BinProductArrow C₂ P₂ (pr21 f) (pr21 g) · pr21 p₁ =
pr21 f
 apply (BinProductPr1Commutes _ _ _ P₂).
        Qed.

G: C₂ ⟶ C₃

HG: preserves_binproduct G

  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂)
H₂: isBinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂)

  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂) H₂: BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
isBinProduct_in_iso_comma_ump · p₂ = g

        
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
p₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, y ⟧
H₁: isBinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂)
H₂: isBinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂)
P₁:= make_BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂) H₁: BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂) H₂: BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
isBinProduct_in_iso_comma_ump · p₂ = g

          
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
p₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, y ⟧
H₁: isBinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂)
H₂: isBinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂)
P₁:= make_BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂) H₁: BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂) H₂: BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
BinProductArrow C₁ P₁ (pr11 f) (pr11 g) · pr11 p₂ =
pr11 g
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
p₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, y ⟧
H₁: isBinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂)
H₂: isBinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂)
P₁:= make_BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂) H₁: BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂) H₂: BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
BinProductArrow C₂ P₂ (pr21 f) (pr21 g) · pr21 p₂ =
pr21 g

          
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
p₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, y ⟧
H₁: isBinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂)
H₂: isBinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂)
P₁:= make_BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂) H₁: BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂) H₂: BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
BinProductArrow C₁ P₁ (pr11 f) (pr11 g) · pr11 p₂ =
pr11 g
 apply (BinProductPr2Commutes _ _ _ P₁).
          
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
p₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, y ⟧
H₁: isBinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂)
H₂: isBinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂)
P₁:= make_BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂) H₁: BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂) H₂: BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
BinProductArrow C₂ P₂ (pr21 f) (pr21 g) · pr21 p₂ =
pr21 g
 apply (BinProductPr2Commutes _ _ _ P₂).
        Qed.
      End UMP.

F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
p₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, y ⟧
H₁: isBinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂)
H₂: isBinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂)
P₁:= make_BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂) H₁: BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂) H₂: BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
isBinProduct (iso_comma F G) x y z p₁ p₂

G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G

p₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, y ⟧
H₁: isBinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂)
H₂: isBinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂)

  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂) H₁: BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂) H₂: BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)

C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
p₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, y ⟧
H₁: isBinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂)
H₂: isBinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂)
P₁:= make_BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂) H₁: BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂) H₂: BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
∃! fg : iso_comma F G ⟦ w, z ⟧,
fg · p₁ = f × fg · p₂ = g

        
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
p₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, y ⟧
H₁: isBinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂)
H₂: isBinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂)
P₁:= make_BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂) H₁: BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂) H₂: BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
isaprop
  (∑ fg : iso_comma F G ⟦ w, z ⟧,
   fg · p₁ = f × fg · p₂ = g)
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G

  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂)
H₂: isBinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂)

f: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
∑ fg : iso_comma F G ⟦ w, z ⟧,
fg · p₁ = f × fg · p₂ = g

        
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
p₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, y ⟧
H₁: isBinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂)
H₂: isBinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂)
P₁:= make_BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂) H₁: BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂) H₂: BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
isaprop
  (∑ fg : iso_comma F G ⟦ w, z ⟧,
   fg · p₁ = f × fg · p₂ = g)
 exact (isBinProduct_in_iso_comma_unique f g).
        
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
p₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, y ⟧

  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂)
H₂: isBinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂)

P₂:= make_BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂) H₂: BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)

f: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
∑ fg : iso_comma F G ⟦ w, z ⟧,
fg · p₁ = f × fg · p₂ = g

  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂)

g: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
iso_comma F G ⟦ w, z ⟧
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
p₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, y ⟧
H₁: isBinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂)
H₂: isBinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂)
P₁:= make_BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂) H₁: BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂) H₂: BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
?pr1 · p₁ = f
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
p₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, y ⟧
H₁: isBinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂)
H₂: isBinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂)
P₁:= make_BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂) H₁: BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂) H₂: BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
(λ _ : ?pr1 · p₁ = f, ?pr1 · p₂ = g) ?pr10

          
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
p₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, y ⟧
H₁: isBinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂)
H₂: isBinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂)
P₁:= make_BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂) H₁: BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂) H₂: BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
iso_comma F G ⟦ w, z ⟧
 exact (isBinProduct_in_iso_comma_ump f g).
          
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
p₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, y ⟧
H₁: isBinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂)
H₂: isBinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂)
P₁:= make_BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂) H₁: BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂) H₂: BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
isBinProduct_in_iso_comma_ump f g · p₁ = f
 exact (isBinProduct_in_iso_comma_ump_pr1 f g).
          
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
p₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, y ⟧
H₁: isBinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂)
H₂: isBinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂)
P₁:= make_BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 p₁) (pr11 p₂) H₁: BinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 p₁) (pr21 p₂) H₂: BinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
(λ _ : isBinProduct_in_iso_comma_ump f g · p₁ = f,
 isBinProduct_in_iso_comma_ump f g · p₂ = g)
  (isBinProduct_in_iso_comma_ump_pr1 f g)
 exact (isBinProduct_in_iso_comma_ump_pr2 f g).
      Defined.
    End IsProductInIsoComma.

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HC₁: BinProducts C₁
HC₂: BinProducts C₂
BinProducts (iso_comma F G)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HC₁: BinProducts C₁
HC₂: BinProducts C₂
BinProducts (iso_comma F G)

      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HC₁: BinProducts C₁
HC₂: BinProducts C₂
x, y: iso_comma F G
BinProduct (iso_comma F G) x y

      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HC₁: BinProducts C₁
HC₂: BinProducts C₂
x, y: iso_comma F G
FP:= make_BinProduct C₃ (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
  (F (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (HF (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C₁
        (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))): BinProduct C₃ (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
BinProduct (iso_comma F G) x y

      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HC₁: BinProducts C₁
HC₂: BinProducts C₂
x, y: iso_comma F G
FP:= make_BinProduct C₃ (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
  (F (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (HF (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C₁
        (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))): BinProduct C₃ (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
GP:= make_BinProduct C₃ (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
  (G (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
  (# G (BinProductPr1 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))
  (# G (BinProductPr2 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))
  (HG (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))
     (BinProductPr1 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C₂
        (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))): BinProduct C₃ (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
BinProduct (iso_comma F G) x y

      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HC₁: BinProducts C₁
HC₂: BinProducts C₂
x, y: iso_comma F G
FP:= make_BinProduct C₃ (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
  (F (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (HF (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C₁
        (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))): BinProduct C₃ (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
GP:= make_BinProduct C₃ (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
  (G (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
  (# G (BinProductPr1 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))
  (# G (BinProductPr2 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))
  (HG (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))
     (BinProductPr1 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C₂
        (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))): BinProduct C₃ (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
iso_comma F G

G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G

  (# G (BinProductPr1 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))
  (# G (BinProductPr2 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))
  (HG (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))
     (BinProductPr1 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C₂
        (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))): BinProduct C₃ (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
iso_comma F G ⟦ ?c, x ⟧

G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F

F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G

isBinProduct (iso_comma F G) x y ?c ?f ?g

 Core.ob_disp

         (iso_comma_disp_cat F G))) x) (?pr1,, ?pr2)

C₁
 exact (BinProductObject _ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))).

(λ _ : C₁, C₂) (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))

(λ x : PrecategoryBinProduct.category_binproduct C₁ C₂,
 Core.ob_disp
   (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
      (Core.disp_cat_data_from_disp_cat
         (iso_comma_disp_cat F G))) x)
  (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y),, HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))
 exact (binproduct_of_z_iso FP GP (pr2 x) (pr2 y)).
      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HC₁: BinProducts C₁
HC₂: BinProducts C₂
x, y: iso_comma F G
FP:= make_BinProduct C₃ (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
  (F (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (HF (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))

GP:= make_BinProduct C₃ (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
  (G (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
  (# G (BinProductPr1 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))
  (# G (BinProductPr2 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))

     (BinProductPr1 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C₂
        (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))): BinProduct C₃ (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
iso_comma F G
⟦ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y),, HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)),,
  binproduct_of_z_iso FP GP (pr2 x) (pr2 y), x ⟧

F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃

  (# F (BinProductPr1 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))

C₁
⟦ pr11 ((HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y),, HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)),,
        binproduct_of_z_iso FP GP (pr2 x) (pr2 y)),
pr11 x ⟧
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HC₁: BinProducts C₁
HC₂: BinProducts C₂
x, y: iso_comma F G
FP:= make_BinProduct C₃ (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
  (F (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))

  (# F (BinProductPr2 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (HF (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C₁
        (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))): BinProduct C₃ (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
GP:= make_BinProduct C₃ (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
  (G (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
  (# G (BinProductPr1 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))
  (# G (BinProductPr2 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))
  (HG (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))
     (BinProductPr1 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C₂
        (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))): BinProduct C₃ (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
(λ _ : C₁
       ⟦ pr11 ((HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y),,
                HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)),,
               binproduct_of_z_iso FP GP (pr2 x)
                 (pr2 y)), pr11 x ⟧,
 C₂
 ⟦ pr21 ((HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y),,
          HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)),,
         binproduct_of_z_iso FP GP (pr2 x) (pr2 y)),
 pr21 x ⟧) ?pr1
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HC₁: BinProducts C₁
HC₂: BinProducts C₂
x, y: iso_comma F G
FP:= make_BinProduct C₃ (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
  (F (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (HF (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C₁
        (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))): BinProduct C₃ (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
GP:= make_BinProduct C₃ (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
  (G (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
  (# G (BinProductPr1 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))
  (# G (BinProductPr2 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))
  (HG (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))
     (BinProductPr1 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C₂
        (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))): BinProduct C₃ (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
(λ f : PrecategoryBinProduct.category_binproduct C₁ C₂
       ⟦ pr1
           ((HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y),,
             HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)),,
            binproduct_of_z_iso FP GP (pr2 x) (pr2 y)),
       pr1 x ⟧,
 Core.mor_disp
   (pr2
      ((HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y),, HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)),,
       binproduct_of_z_iso FP GP (pr2 x) (pr2 y)))
   (pr2 x) f) (?pr1,, ?pr2)

        
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HC₁: BinProducts C₁
HC₂: BinProducts C₂
x, y: iso_comma F G
FP:= make_BinProduct C₃ (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
  (F (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (HF (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C₁
        (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))): BinProduct C₃ (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
GP:= make_BinProduct C₃ (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
  (G (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
  (# G (BinProductPr1 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))
  (# G (BinProductPr2 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))
  (HG (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))
     (BinProductPr1 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C₂
        (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))): BinProduct C₃ (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
C₁
⟦ pr11 ((HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y),, HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)),,
        binproduct_of_z_iso FP GP (pr2 x) (pr2 y)),
pr11 x ⟧
 exact (BinProductPr1 _ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))).
        
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HC₁: BinProducts C₁
HC₂: BinProducts C₂
x, y: iso_comma F G
FP:= make_BinProduct C₃ (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
  (F (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (HF (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C₁
        (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))): BinProduct C₃ (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
GP:= make_BinProduct C₃ (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
  (G (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
  (# G (BinProductPr1 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))
  (# G (BinProductPr2 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))
  (HG (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))
     (BinProductPr1 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C₂
        (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))): BinProduct C₃ (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
(λ _ : C₁
       ⟦ pr11 ((HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y),,
                HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)),,
               binproduct_of_z_iso FP GP (pr2 x)
                 (pr2 y)), pr11 x ⟧,
 C₂
 ⟦ pr21 ((HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y),,
          HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)),,
         binproduct_of_z_iso FP GP (pr2 x) (pr2 y)),
 pr21 x ⟧) (BinProductPr1 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
 exact (BinProductPr1 _ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))).
        
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HC₁: BinProducts C₁
HC₂: BinProducts C₂
x, y: iso_comma F G
FP:= make_BinProduct C₃ (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
  (F (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (HF (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C₁
        (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))): BinProduct C₃ (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
GP:= make_BinProduct C₃ (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
  (G (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
  (# G (BinProductPr1 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))
  (# G (BinProductPr2 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))
  (HG (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))
     (BinProductPr1 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C₂
        (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))): BinProduct C₃ (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
(λ f : PrecategoryBinProduct.category_binproduct C₁ C₂
       ⟦ pr1
           ((HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y),,
             HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)),,
            binproduct_of_z_iso FP GP (pr2 x) (pr2 y)),
       pr1 x ⟧,
 Core.mor_disp
   (pr2
      ((HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y),, HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)),,
       binproduct_of_z_iso FP GP (pr2 x) (pr2 y)))
   (pr2 x) f)
  (BinProductPr1 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)),,
   BinProductPr1 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
 exact (!(BinProductOfArrowsPr1 _ GP FP (pr12 x) (pr12 y))).
      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HC₁: BinProducts C₁
HC₂: BinProducts C₂
x, y: iso_comma F G
FP:= make_BinProduct C₃ (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
  (F (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (HF (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C₁
        (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))): BinProduct C₃ (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
GP:= make_BinProduct C₃ (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
  (G (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
  (# G (BinProductPr1 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))
  (# G (BinProductPr2 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))
  (HG (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))
     (BinProductPr1 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C₂
        (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))): BinProduct C₃ (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
iso_comma F G
⟦ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y),, HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)),,
  binproduct_of_z_iso FP GP (pr2 x) (pr2 y), y ⟧

       ⟦ pr11 ((HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y),,

               binproduct_of_z_iso FP GP (pr2 x)
                 (pr2 y)), pr11 y ⟧,
 C₂
 ⟦ pr21 ((HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y),,
          HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)),,
         binproduct_of_z_iso FP GP (pr2 x) (pr2 y)),
 pr21 y ⟧) ?pr1

F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HC₁: BinProducts C₁
HC₂: BinProducts C₂
x, y: iso_comma F G
FP:= make_BinProduct C₃ (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
  (F (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (HF (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C₁
        (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))): BinProduct C₃ (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
GP:= make_BinProduct C₃ (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
  (G (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
  (# G (BinProductPr1 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))
  (# G (BinProductPr2 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))

     (BinProductPr1 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C₂
        (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))): BinProduct C₃ (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
(λ f : PrecategoryBinProduct.category_binproduct C₁ C₂
       ⟦ pr1
           ((HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y),,
             HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)),,
            binproduct_of_z_iso FP GP (pr2 x) (pr2 y)),
       pr1 y ⟧,
 Core.mor_disp
   (pr2
      ((HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y),, HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)),,
       binproduct_of_z_iso FP GP (pr2 x) (pr2 y)))
   (pr2 y) f) (?pr1,, ?pr2)

        
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HC₁: BinProducts C₁
HC₂: BinProducts C₂
x, y: iso_comma F G
FP:= make_BinProduct C₃ (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
  (F (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (HF (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C₁
        (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))): BinProduct C₃ (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
GP:= make_BinProduct C₃ (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
  (G (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
  (# G (BinProductPr1 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))
  (# G (BinProductPr2 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))
  (HG (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))
     (BinProductPr1 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C₂
        (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))): BinProduct C₃ (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
C₁
⟦ pr11 ((HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y),, HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)),,
        binproduct_of_z_iso FP GP (pr2 x) (pr2 y)),
pr11 y ⟧
 exact (BinProductPr2 _ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))).

F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G

     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C₂
        (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))): BinProduct C₃ (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
(λ _ : C₁
       ⟦ pr11 ((HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y),,
                HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)),,
               binproduct_of_z_iso FP GP (pr2 x)
                 (pr2 y)), pr11 y ⟧,
 C₂
 ⟦ pr21 ((HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y),,
          HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)),,
         binproduct_of_z_iso FP GP (pr2 x) (pr2 y)),
 pr21 y ⟧) (BinProductPr2 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
 exact (BinProductPr2 _ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))).
        
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HC₁: BinProducts C₁
HC₂: BinProducts C₂
x, y: iso_comma F G
FP:= make_BinProduct C₃ (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
  (F (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (HF (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C₁
        (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))): BinProduct C₃ (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
GP:= make_BinProduct C₃ (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
  (G (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
  (# G (BinProductPr1 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))
  (# G (BinProductPr2 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))
  (HG (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))
     (BinProductPr1 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C₂
        (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))): BinProduct C₃ (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
(λ f : PrecategoryBinProduct.category_binproduct C₁ C₂
       ⟦ pr1
           ((HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y),,
             HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)),,
            binproduct_of_z_iso FP GP (pr2 x) (pr2 y)),
       pr1 y ⟧,
 Core.mor_disp
   (pr2
      ((HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y),, HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)),,
       binproduct_of_z_iso FP GP (pr2 x) (pr2 y)))
   (pr2 y) f)
  (BinProductPr2 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)),,
   BinProductPr2 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
 exact (!(BinProductOfArrowsPr2 _ GP FP (pr12 x) (pr12 y))).
      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HC₁: BinProducts C₁
HC₂: BinProducts C₂
x, y: iso_comma F G
FP:= make_BinProduct C₃ (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
  (F (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (HF (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C₁
        (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))): BinProduct C₃ (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
GP:= make_BinProduct C₃ (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
  (G (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
  (# G (BinProductPr1 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))
  (# G (BinProductPr2 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))
  (HG (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))
     (BinProductPr1 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C₂
        (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))): BinProduct C₃ (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
isBinProduct (iso_comma F G) x y
  ((HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y),, HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)),,
   binproduct_of_z_iso FP GP (pr2 x) (pr2 y))
  ((BinProductPr1 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)),,
    BinProductPr1 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))),,
   ! BinProductOfArrowsPr1 C₃ GP FP (pr12 x) (pr12 y))
  ((BinProductPr2 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)),,
    BinProductPr2 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))),,
   ! BinProductOfArrowsPr2 C₃ GP FP (pr12 x) (pr12 y))
  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HC₁: BinProducts C₁
HC₂: BinProducts C₂
x, y: iso_comma F G
FP:= make_BinProduct C₃ (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
  (F (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (HF (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C₁
        (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))): BinProduct C₃ (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
GP:= make_BinProduct C₃ (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
  (G (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
  (# G (BinProductPr1 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))
  (# G (BinProductPr2 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))
  (HG (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))
     (BinProductPr1 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C₂
        (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))): BinProduct C₃ (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
isBinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
  (pr11 ((HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y),,
          HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)),,
         binproduct_of_z_iso FP GP (pr2 x) (pr2 y)))
  (pr11 ((BinProductPr1 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)),,
          BinProductPr1 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))),,
         ! BinProductOfArrowsPr1 C₃ GP FP (pr12 x)
             (pr12 y)))
  (pr11 ((BinProductPr2 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)),,
          BinProductPr2 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))),,
         ! BinProductOfArrowsPr2 C₃ GP FP (pr12 x)
             (pr12 y)))
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HC₁: BinProducts C₁
HC₂: BinProducts C₂
x, y: iso_comma F G
FP:= make_BinProduct C₃ (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
  (F (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (HF (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C₁
        (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))): BinProduct C₃ (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
GP:= make_BinProduct C₃ (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
  (G (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
  (# G (BinProductPr1 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))
  (# G (BinProductPr2 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))
  (HG (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))
     (BinProductPr1 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C₂
        (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))): BinProduct C₃ (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
isBinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
  (pr21 ((HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y),,
          HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)),,
         binproduct_of_z_iso FP GP (pr2 x) (pr2 y)))
  (pr21 ((BinProductPr1 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)),,
          BinProductPr1 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))),,
         ! BinProductOfArrowsPr1 C₃ GP FP (pr12 x)
             (pr12 y)))
  (pr21 ((BinProductPr2 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)),,
          BinProductPr2 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))),,
         ! BinProductOfArrowsPr2 C₃ GP FP (pr12 x)
             (pr12 y)))

         
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HC₁: BinProducts C₁
HC₂: BinProducts C₂
x, y: iso_comma F G
FP:= make_BinProduct C₃ (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
  (F (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (HF (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C₁
        (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))): BinProduct C₃ (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
GP:= make_BinProduct C₃ (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
  (G (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
  (# G (BinProductPr1 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))
  (# G (BinProductPr2 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))
  (HG (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))
     (BinProductPr1 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C₂
        (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))): BinProduct C₃ (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
isBinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
  (pr11 ((HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y),,
          HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)),,
         binproduct_of_z_iso FP GP (pr2 x) (pr2 y)))
  (pr11 ((BinProductPr1 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)),,
          BinProductPr1 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))),,
         ! BinProductOfArrowsPr1 C₃ GP FP (pr12 x)
             (pr12 y)))
  (pr11 ((BinProductPr2 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)),,
          BinProductPr2 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))),,
         ! BinProductOfArrowsPr2 C₃ GP FP (pr12 x)
             (pr12 y)))
 apply isBinProduct_BinProduct.
         
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HC₁: BinProducts C₁
HC₂: BinProducts C₂
x, y: iso_comma F G
FP:= make_BinProduct C₃ (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
  (F (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (HF (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C₁
        (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))): BinProduct C₃ (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
GP:= make_BinProduct C₃ (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
  (G (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
  (# G (BinProductPr1 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))
  (# G (BinProductPr2 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))
  (HG (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))
     (BinProductPr1 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C₂
        (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))): BinProduct C₃ (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
isBinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
  (pr21 ((HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y),,
          HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)),,
         binproduct_of_z_iso FP GP (pr2 x) (pr2 y)))
  (pr21 ((BinProductPr1 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)),,
          BinProductPr1 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))),,
         ! BinProductOfArrowsPr1 C₃ GP FP (pr12 x)
             (pr12 y)))
  (pr21 ((BinProductPr2 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)),,
          BinProductPr2 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))),,
         ! BinProductOfArrowsPr2 C₃ GP FP (pr12 x)
             (pr12 y)))
 apply isBinProduct_BinProduct.
    Defined.

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HC₁: BinProducts C₁
HC₂: BinProducts C₂
preserves_binproduct (iso_comma_pr1 F G)

C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HC₁: BinProducts C₁
HC₂: BinProducts C₂
x, y: iso_comma F G
isBinProduct C₁ (iso_comma_pr1 F G x)
  (iso_comma_pr1 F G y)
  (iso_comma_pr1 F G
     (binproducts_in_iso_comma HC₁ HC₂ x y))
  (# (iso_comma_pr1 F G)
     (BinProductPr1 (iso_comma F G)
        (binproducts_in_iso_comma HC₁ HC₂ x y)))
  (# (iso_comma_pr1 F G)
     (BinProductPr2 (iso_comma F G)
        (binproducts_in_iso_comma HC₁ HC₂ x y)))

        
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HC₁: BinProducts C₁
HC₂: BinProducts C₂
x, y: iso_comma F G
isBinProduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
  (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))
  (BinProductPr1 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
  (BinProductPr2 C₁ (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))

        apply isBinProduct_BinProduct.
    Defined.

HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HC₁: BinProducts C₁
HC₂: BinProducts C₂
x, y: iso_comma F G
isBinProduct C₂ (iso_comma_pr2 F G x)
  (iso_comma_pr2 F G y)
  (iso_comma_pr2 F G
     (binproducts_in_iso_comma HC₁ HC₂ x y))
  (# (iso_comma_pr2 F G)
     (BinProductPr1 (iso_comma F G)
        (binproducts_in_iso_comma HC₁ HC₂ x y)))
  (# (iso_comma_pr2 F G)
     (BinProductPr2 (iso_comma F G)
        (binproducts_in_iso_comma HC₁ HC₂ x y)))

HG: preserves_binproduct G

HC₂: BinProducts C₂
x, y: iso_comma F G
isBinProduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
  (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))
  (BinProductPr1 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
  (BinProductPr2 C₂ (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))

        apply isBinProduct_BinProduct.
    Defined.

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
C₀: category
H₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
HH₁: preserves_binproduct H₁
H₂: C₀ ⟶ C₂
HH₂: preserves_binproduct H₂
α: nat_z_iso (H₁ ∙ F) (H₂ ∙ G)
preserves_binproduct (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
C₀: category
H₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
HH₁: preserves_binproduct H₁
H₂: C₀ ⟶ C₂
HH₂: preserves_binproduct H₂
α: nat_z_iso (H₁ ∙ F) (H₂ ∙ G)
preserves_binproduct (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α)

      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
C₀: category
H₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
HH₁: preserves_binproduct H₁
H₂: C₀ ⟶ C₂
HH₂: preserves_binproduct H₂
α: nat_z_iso (H₁ ∙ F) (H₂ ∙ G)
x, y, z: C₀
π₁: C₀ ⟦ z, x ⟧
π₂: C₀ ⟦ z, y ⟧
Hx: isBinProduct C₀ x y z π₁ π₂
isBinProduct (iso_comma F G)
  (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α x)
  (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α y)
  (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α z)
  (# (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α) π₁)
  (# (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α) π₂)

      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
C₀: category
H₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
HH₁: preserves_binproduct H₁
H₂: C₀ ⟶ C₂
HH₂: preserves_binproduct H₂
α: nat_z_iso (H₁ ∙ F) (H₂ ∙ G)
x, y, z: C₀
π₁: C₀ ⟦ z, x ⟧
π₂: C₀ ⟦ z, y ⟧
Hx: isBinProduct C₀ x y z π₁ π₂
isBinProduct C₁ (pr11 (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α x))
  (pr11 (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α y))
  (pr11 (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α z))
  (pr11 (# (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α) π₁))
  (pr11 (# (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α) π₂))
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
C₀: category
H₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
HH₁: preserves_binproduct H₁
H₂: C₀ ⟶ C₂
HH₂: preserves_binproduct H₂
α: nat_z_iso (H₁ ∙ F) (H₂ ∙ G)
x, y, z: C₀
π₁: C₀ ⟦ z, x ⟧
π₂: C₀ ⟦ z, y ⟧
Hx: isBinProduct C₀ x y z π₁ π₂
isBinProduct C₂ (pr21 (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α x))
  (pr21 (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α y))
  (pr21 (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α z))
  (pr21 (# (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α) π₁))
  (pr21 (# (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α) π₂))

      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
C₀: category
H₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
HH₁: preserves_binproduct H₁
H₂: C₀ ⟶ C₂
HH₂: preserves_binproduct H₂
α: nat_z_iso (H₁ ∙ F) (H₂ ∙ G)
x, y, z: C₀
π₁: C₀ ⟦ z, x ⟧
π₂: C₀ ⟦ z, y ⟧
Hx: isBinProduct C₀ x y z π₁ π₂
isBinProduct C₁ (pr11 (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α x))
  (pr11 (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α y))
  (pr11 (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α z))
  (pr11 (# (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α) π₁))
  (pr11 (# (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α) π₂))
 
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
C₀: category
H₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
HH₁: preserves_binproduct H₁
H₂: C₀ ⟶ C₂
HH₂: preserves_binproduct H₂
α: nat_z_iso (H₁ ∙ F) (H₂ ∙ G)
x, y, z: C₀
π₁: C₀ ⟦ z, x ⟧
π₂: C₀ ⟦ z, y ⟧
Hx: isBinProduct C₀ x y z π₁ π₂
isBinProduct C₀ x y z π₁ π₂

        exact Hx.
      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
C₀: category
H₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
HH₁: preserves_binproduct H₁
H₂: C₀ ⟶ C₂
HH₂: preserves_binproduct H₂
α: nat_z_iso (H₁ ∙ F) (H₂ ∙ G)
x, y, z: C₀
π₁: C₀ ⟦ z, x ⟧
π₂: C₀ ⟦ z, y ⟧
Hx: isBinProduct C₀ x y z π₁ π₂
isBinProduct C₂ (pr21 (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α x))
  (pr21 (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α y))
  (pr21 (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α z))
  (pr21 (# (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α) π₁))
  (pr21 (# (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α) π₂))
 
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
C₀: category
H₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
HH₁: preserves_binproduct H₁
H₂: C₀ ⟶ C₂
HH₂: preserves_binproduct H₂
α: nat_z_iso (H₁ ∙ F) (H₂ ∙ G)
x, y, z: C₀
π₁: C₀ ⟦ z, x ⟧
π₂: C₀ ⟦ z, y ⟧
Hx: isBinProduct C₀ x y z π₁ π₂
isBinProduct C₀ x y z π₁ π₂

        exact Hx.
    Defined.
  End Product.

  (**
   3. Pullbacks
   *)
  Section Pullbacks.
    Context (HF : preserves_pullback F)
            (HG : preserves_pullback G).

    Section IsPullbackIsoComma.
      Context {pb x y z : iso_comma F G}
              (f : x --> z)
              (g : y --> z)
              (π₁ : pb --> x)
              (π₂ : pb --> y)
              (sqr₁ : pr11 π₁ · pr11 f = pr11 π₂ · pr11 g)
              (H₁ : isPullback sqr₁)
              (sqr₂ : pr21 π₁ · pr21 f = pr21 π₂ · pr21 g)
              (H₂ : isPullback sqr₂)
              (sqr₃ : π₁ · f = π₂ · g).

      Let P₁ : Pullback (pr11 f) (pr11 g) := make_Pullback _ H₁.
      Let P₂ : Pullback (pr21 f) (pr21 g) := make_Pullback _ H₂.

      Section UMP.
        Context {w : iso_comma F G}
                (h₁ : w --> x)
                (h₂ : w --> y)
                (p : h₁ · f = h₂ · g).

        
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
pb, x, y, z: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
π₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ pb, y ⟧
sqr₁: pr11 π₁ · pr11 f = pr11 π₂ · pr11 g
H₁: isPullback sqr₁
sqr₂: pr21 π₁ · pr21 f = pr21 π₂ · pr21 g
H₂: isPullback sqr₂
sqr₃: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
P₁:= make_Pullback sqr₁ H₁: Pullback (pr11 f) (pr11 g)
P₂:= make_Pullback sqr₂ H₂: Pullback (pr21 f) (pr21 g)
w: iso_comma F G
h₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
p: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
isaprop
  (∑ hk : iso_comma F G ⟦ w, pb ⟧,
   hk · π₁ = h₁ × hk · π₂ = h₂)

        
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
pb, x, y, z: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
π₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ pb, y ⟧
sqr₁: pr11 π₁ · pr11 f = pr11 π₂ · pr11 g
H₁: isPullback sqr₁
sqr₂: pr21 π₁ · pr21 f = pr21 π₂ · pr21 g
H₂: isPullback sqr₂
sqr₃: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
P₁:= make_Pullback sqr₁ H₁: Pullback (pr11 f) (pr11 g)
P₂:= make_Pullback sqr₂ H₂: Pullback (pr21 f) (pr21 g)
w: iso_comma F G
h₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
p: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
isaprop
  (∑ hk : iso_comma F G ⟦ w, pb ⟧,
   hk · π₁ = h₁ × hk · π₂ = h₂)

          
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
pb, x, y, z: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
π₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ pb, y ⟧
sqr₁: pr11 π₁ · pr11 f = pr11 π₂ · pr11 g
H₁: isPullback sqr₁
sqr₂: pr21 π₁ · pr21 f = pr21 π₂ · pr21 g
H₂: isPullback sqr₂
sqr₃: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
P₁:= make_Pullback sqr₁ H₁: Pullback (pr11 f) (pr11 g)
P₂:= make_Pullback sqr₂ H₂: Pullback (pr21 f) (pr21 g)
w: iso_comma F G
h₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
p: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
isProofIrrelevant
  (∑ hk : iso_comma F G ⟦ w, pb ⟧,
   hk · π₁ = h₁ × hk · π₂ = h₂)

          
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
pb, x, y, z: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
π₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ pb, y ⟧
sqr₁: pr11 π₁ · pr11 f = pr11 π₂ · pr11 g
H₁: isPullback sqr₁
sqr₂: pr21 π₁ · pr21 f = pr21 π₂ · pr21 g
H₂: isPullback sqr₂
sqr₃: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
P₁:= make_Pullback sqr₁ H₁: Pullback (pr11 f) (pr11 g)
P₂:= make_Pullback sqr₂ H₂: Pullback (pr21 f) (pr21 g)
w: iso_comma F G
h₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
p: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : iso_comma F G ⟦ w, pb ⟧,
hk · π₁ = h₁ × hk · π₂ = h₂
φ₁ = φ₂

          
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G

f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
π₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ pb, y ⟧
sqr₁: pr11 π₁ · pr11 f = pr11 π₂ · pr11 g
H₁: isPullback sqr₁
sqr₂: pr21 π₁ · pr21 f = pr21 π₂ · pr21 g
H₂: isPullback sqr₂
sqr₃: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
P₁:= make_Pullback sqr₁ H₁: Pullback (pr11 f) (pr11 g)
P₂:= make_Pullback sqr₂ H₂: Pullback (pr21 f) (pr21 g)

h₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
p: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : iso_comma F G ⟦ w, pb ⟧,
hk · π₁ = h₁ × hk · π₂ = h₂
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : iso_comma F G ⟦ w, pb ⟧,
   x0 · π₁ = h₁ × x0 · π₂ = h₂)
C₁, C₂, C₃: category

HG: preserves_pullback G

g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧

π₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ pb, y ⟧
sqr₁: pr11 π₁ · pr11 f = pr11 π₂ · pr11 g
H₁: isPullback sqr₁
sqr₂: pr21 π₁ · pr21 f = pr21 π₂ · pr21 g

p: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : iso_comma F G ⟦ w, pb ⟧,
hk · π₁ = h₁ × hk · π₂ = h₂
pr1 φ₁ = pr1 φ₂

φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : iso_comma F G ⟦ w, pb ⟧,
hk · π₁ = h₁ × hk · π₂ = h₂
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : iso_comma F G ⟦ w, pb ⟧,
   x0 · π₁ = h₁ × x0 · π₂ = h₂)

            
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
pb, x, y, z: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
π₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ pb, y ⟧
sqr₁: pr11 π₁ · pr11 f = pr11 π₂ · pr11 g
H₁: isPullback sqr₁
sqr₂: pr21 π₁ · pr21 f = pr21 π₂ · pr21 g
H₂: isPullback sqr₂
sqr₃: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
P₁:= make_Pullback sqr₁ H₁: Pullback (pr11 f) (pr11 g)
P₂:= make_Pullback sqr₂ H₂: Pullback (pr21 f) (pr21 g)
w: iso_comma F G
h₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
p: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : iso_comma F G ⟦ w, pb ⟧,
hk · π₁ = h₁ × hk · π₂ = h₂
x0: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, pb ⟧
isaprop (x0 · π₁ = h₁ × x0 · π₂ = h₂)

            apply isapropdirprod ; apply homset_property.

hk · π₁ = h₁ × hk · π₂ = h₂

φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : iso_comma F G ⟦ w, pb ⟧,
hk · π₁ = h₁ × hk · π₂ = h₂
pr111 φ₁ · pr11 π₂ = pr111 φ₂ · pr11 π₂

            
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
pb, x, y, z: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
π₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ pb, y ⟧
sqr₁: pr11 π₁ · pr11 f = pr11 π₂ · pr11 g
H₁: isPullback sqr₁
sqr₂: pr21 π₁ · pr21 f = pr21 π₂ · pr21 g
H₂: isPullback sqr₂
sqr₃: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
P₁:= make_Pullback sqr₁ H₁: Pullback (pr11 f) (pr11 g)
P₂:= make_Pullback sqr₂ H₂: Pullback (pr21 f) (pr21 g)
w: iso_comma F G
h₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
p: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : iso_comma F G ⟦ w, pb ⟧,
hk · π₁ = h₁ × hk · π₂ = h₂
pr111 φ₁ · pr11 π₁ = pr111 φ₂ · pr11 π₁

C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
pb, x, y, z: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
π₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ pb, y ⟧
