H₁: isPullback sqr₁
sqr₂: pr21 π₁ · pr21 f = pr21 π₂ · pr21 g
H₂: isPullback sqr₂

φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : iso_comma F G ⟦ w, pb ⟧,
hk · π₁ = h₁ × hk · π₂ = h₂
dirprod_pr2 (pr1 h₁) = pr211 φ₂ · pr21 π₁

              exact (!(maponpaths (λ z, dirprod_pr2 (pr1 z)) (pr12 φ₂))).

dirprod_pr2 (pr1 h₂) = pr211 φ₂ · pr21 π₂

              exact (!(maponpaths (λ z, dirprod_pr2 (pr1 z)) (pr22 φ₂))).
        Qed.

G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G

f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧

p: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
(λ f : PrecategoryBinProduct.category_binproduct C₁ C₂
       ⟦ pr1 w, pr1 pb ⟧,
 Core.mor_disp (pr2 w) (pr2 pb) f) 
  (?pr1,, ?pr2)

H₁: isPullback sqr₁
sqr₂: pr21 π₁ · pr21 f = pr21 π₂ · pr21 g

pr11 h₁ · pr11 f = pr11 h₂ · pr11 g

            abstract (exact (maponpaths (λ z, pr11 z) p)).

G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
pb, x, y, z: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
π₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ pb, y ⟧
sqr₁: pr11 π₁ · pr11 f = pr11 π₂ · pr11 g
H₁: isPullback sqr₁
sqr₂: pr21 π₁ · pr21 f = pr21 π₂ · pr21 g
H₂: isPullback sqr₂
sqr₃: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
P₁:= make_Pullback sqr₁ H₁: Pullback (pr11 f) (pr11 g)
P₂:= make_Pullback sqr₂ H₂: Pullback (pr21 f) (pr21 g)
w: iso_comma F G
h₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
p: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
(λ _ : C₁ ⟦ pr11 w, pr11 pb ⟧, C₂ ⟦ pr21 w, pr21 pb ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow P₁ (pr11 w) (pr11 h₁) (pr11 h₂)
     isPullback_iso_comma_mor_subproof)
 
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
pb, x, y, z: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
π₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ pb, y ⟧
sqr₁: pr11 π₁ · pr11 f = pr11 π₂ · pr11 g
H₁: isPullback sqr₁
sqr₂: pr21 π₁ · pr21 f = pr21 π₂ · pr21 g
H₂: isPullback sqr₂
sqr₃: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
P₁:= make_Pullback sqr₁ H₁: Pullback (pr11 f) (pr11 g)
P₂:= make_Pullback sqr₂ H₂: Pullback (pr21 f) (pr21 g)
w: iso_comma F G
h₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
p: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
pr21 h₁ · pr21 f = pr21 h₂ · pr21 g

            abstract (exact (maponpaths (λ z, dirprod_pr2 (pr1 z)) p)).
          
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
pb, x, y, z: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
π₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ pb, y ⟧
sqr₁: pr11 π₁ · pr11 f = pr11 π₂ · pr11 g
H₁: isPullback sqr₁
sqr₂: pr21 π₁ · pr21 f = pr21 π₂ · pr21 g
H₂: isPullback sqr₂
sqr₃: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
P₁:= make_Pullback sqr₁ H₁: Pullback (pr11 f) (pr11 g)
P₂:= make_Pullback sqr₂ H₂: Pullback (pr21 f) (pr21 g)
w: iso_comma F G
h₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
p: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
(λ f : PrecategoryBinProduct.category_binproduct C₁ C₂
       ⟦ pr1 w, pr1 pb ⟧,
 Core.mor_disp (pr2 w) (pr2 pb) f)
  (PullbackArrow P₁ (pr11 w) (pr11 h₁) (pr11 h₂)
     isPullback_iso_comma_mor_subproof,,
   PullbackArrow P₂ (pr21 w) (pr21 h₁) (pr21 h₂)
     isPullback_iso_comma_mor_subproof0)
 
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
pb, x, y, z: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
π₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ pb, y ⟧
sqr₁: pr11 π₁ · pr11 f = pr11 π₂ · pr11 g
H₁: isPullback sqr₁
sqr₂: pr21 π₁ · pr21 f = pr21 π₂ · pr21 g
H₂: isPullback sqr₂
sqr₃: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
P₁:= make_Pullback sqr₁ H₁: Pullback (pr11 f) (pr11 g)
P₂:= make_Pullback sqr₂ H₂: Pullback (pr21 f) (pr21 g)
w: iso_comma F G
h₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
p: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
# G (pr121 P₂) · # G (pr21 f) =
# G (pr221 P₂) · # G (pr21 g)
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
pb, x, y, z: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
π₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ pb, y ⟧
sqr₁: pr11 π₁ · pr11 f = pr11 π₂ · pr11 g
H₁: isPullback sqr₁
sqr₂: pr21 π₁ · pr21 f = pr21 π₂ · pr21 g
H₂: isPullback sqr₂
sqr₃: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
P₁:= make_Pullback sqr₁ H₁: Pullback (pr11 f) (pr11 g)
P₂:= make_Pullback sqr₂ H₂: Pullback (pr21 f) (pr21 g)
w: iso_comma F G
h₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
p: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
# F
  (pr1
     (PullbackArrow P₁ (pr11 w) 
        (pr11 h₁) (pr11 h₂)
        isPullback_iso_comma_mor_subproof,,
      PullbackArrow P₂ (pr21 w) 
        (pr21 h₁) (pr21 h₂)
        isPullback_iso_comma_mor_subproof0)) · 
pr2 pb · # G (pr121 P₂) =
pr2 w
· # G
    (pr2
       (PullbackArrow P₁ 
          (pr11 w) (pr11 h₁) 
          (pr11 h₂) isPullback_iso_comma_mor_subproof,,
        PullbackArrow P₂ 
          (pr21 w) (pr21 h₁) 
          (pr21 h₂) isPullback_iso_comma_mor_subproof0))
· # G (pr121 P₂)

F: C₁ ⟶ C₃

HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G

g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧

sqr₁: pr11 π₁ · pr11 f = pr11 π₂ · pr11 g

sqr₂: pr21 π₁ · pr21 f = pr21 π₂ · pr21 g

P₁:= make_Pullback sqr₁ H₁: Pullback (pr11 f) (pr11 g)
P₂:= make_Pullback sqr₂ H₂: Pullback (pr21 f) (pr21 g)

h₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
p: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
# F
  (pr1
     (PullbackArrow P₁ (pr11 w) 
        (pr11 h₁) (pr11 h₂)
        isPullback_iso_comma_mor_subproof,,
      PullbackArrow P₂ (pr21 w) 
        (pr21 h₁) (pr21 h₂)
        isPullback_iso_comma_mor_subproof0)) · 
pr2 pb · # G (pr221 P₂) =
pr2 w
· # G
    (pr2
       (PullbackArrow P₁ 
          (pr11 w) (pr11 h₁) 
          (pr11 h₂) isPullback_iso_comma_mor_subproof,,
        PullbackArrow P₂

C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
pb, x, y, z: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
π₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ pb, y ⟧
sqr₁: pr11 π₁ · pr11 f = pr11 π₂ · pr11 g
H₁: isPullback sqr₁
sqr₂: pr21 π₁ · pr21 f = pr21 π₂ · pr21 g
H₂: isPullback sqr₂
sqr₃: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
P₁:= make_Pullback sqr₁ H₁: Pullback (pr11 f) (pr11 g)
P₂:= make_Pullback sqr₂ H₂: Pullback (pr21 f) (pr21 g)
w: iso_comma F G
h₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
p: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
# G (pr121 P₂) · # G (pr21 f) =
# G (pr221 P₂) · # G (pr21 g)
 abstract
                (rewrite <- !functor_comp ;
                 apply maponpaths ;
                 exact (PullbackSqrCommutes P₂)).
            
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
pb, x, y, z: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
π₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ pb, y ⟧
sqr₁: pr11 π₁ · pr11 f = pr11 π₂ · pr11 g
H₁: isPullback sqr₁
sqr₂: pr21 π₁ · pr21 f = pr21 π₂ · pr21 g
H₂: isPullback sqr₂
sqr₃: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
P₁:= make_Pullback sqr₁ H₁: Pullback (pr11 f) (pr11 g)
P₂:= make_Pullback sqr₂ H₂: Pullback (pr21 f) (pr21 g)
w: iso_comma F G
h₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
p: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
# F
  (pr1
     (PullbackArrow P₁ (pr11 w) (pr11 h₁) (pr11 h₂)
        isPullback_iso_comma_mor_subproof,,
      PullbackArrow P₂ (pr21 w) (pr21 h₁) (pr21 h₂)
        isPullback_iso_comma_mor_subproof0)) · pr2 pb
· # G (pr121 P₂) =
pr2 w
· # G
    (pr2
       (PullbackArrow P₁ (pr11 w) (pr11 h₁) (pr11 h₂)
          isPullback_iso_comma_mor_subproof,,
        PullbackArrow P₂ (pr21 w) (pr21 h₁) (pr21 h₂)
          isPullback_iso_comma_mor_subproof0))
· # G (pr121 P₂)
 abstract
                (cbn ;
                 rewrite !assoc' ;
                 rewrite <- !functor_comp ;
                 rewrite (PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 P₂) ;
                 refine (_ @ pr2 h₁) ;
                 rewrite <- (pr2 π₁) ;
                 rewrite !assoc ;
                 apply maponpaths_2 ;
                 rewrite <- !functor_comp ;
                 apply maponpaths ;
                 apply (PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 P₁)).
            
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
pb, x, y, z: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
π₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ pb, y ⟧
sqr₁: pr11 π₁ · pr11 f = pr11 π₂ · pr11 g
H₁: isPullback sqr₁
sqr₂: pr21 π₁ · pr21 f = pr21 π₂ · pr21 g
H₂: isPullback sqr₂
sqr₃: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
P₁:= make_Pullback sqr₁ H₁: Pullback (pr11 f) (pr11 g)
P₂:= make_Pullback sqr₂ H₂: Pullback (pr21 f) (pr21 g)
w: iso_comma F G
h₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
p: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
# F
  (pr1
     (PullbackArrow P₁ (pr11 w) (pr11 h₁) (pr11 h₂)
        isPullback_iso_comma_mor_subproof,,
      PullbackArrow P₂ (pr21 w) (pr21 h₁) (pr21 h₂)
        isPullback_iso_comma_mor_subproof0)) · pr2 pb
· # G (pr221 P₂) =
pr2 w
· # G
    (pr2
       (PullbackArrow P₁ (pr11 w) (pr11 h₁) (pr11 h₂)
          isPullback_iso_comma_mor_subproof,,
        PullbackArrow P₂ (pr21 w) (pr21 h₁) (pr21 h₂)
          isPullback_iso_comma_mor_subproof0))
· # G (pr221 P₂)
 abstract
                (cbn ;
                 rewrite !assoc' ;
                 rewrite <- !functor_comp ;
                 rewrite (PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 P₂) ;
                 refine (_ @ pr2 h₂) ;
                 rewrite <- (pr2 π₂) ;
                 rewrite !assoc ;
                 apply maponpaths_2 ;
                 rewrite <- !functor_comp ;
                 apply maponpaths ;
                 apply (PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 P₁)).
        Defined.

        
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
pb, x, y, z: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
π₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ pb, y ⟧
sqr₁: pr11 π₁ · pr11 f = pr11 π₂ · pr11 g
H₁: isPullback sqr₁
sqr₂: pr21 π₁ · pr21 f = pr21 π₂ · pr21 g
H₂: isPullback sqr₂
sqr₃: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
P₁:= make_Pullback sqr₁ H₁: Pullback (pr11 f) (pr11 g)
P₂:= make_Pullback sqr₂ H₂: Pullback (pr21 f) (pr21 g)
w: iso_comma F G
h₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
p: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
isPullback_iso_comma_mor · π₁ = h₁

pr11 (isPullback_iso_comma_mor · π₁) = pr11 h₁

pr11 (isPullback_iso_comma_mor · π₁) = pr11 h₁
 apply (PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 P₁).

HF: preserves_pullback F

F: C₁ ⟶ C₃

HF: preserves_pullback F

f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧

π₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ pb, y ⟧

H₁: isPullback sqr₁
sqr₂: pr21 π₁ · pr21 f = pr21 π₂ · pr21 g
H₂: isPullback sqr₂
sqr₃: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
P₁:= make_Pullback sqr₁ H₁: Pullback (pr11 f) (pr11 g)
P₂:= make_Pullback sqr₂ H₂: Pullback (pr21 f) (pr21 g)
w: iso_comma F G
h₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
p: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
isPullback_iso_comma_mor · π₂ = h₂

HG: preserves_pullback G

π₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ pb, y ⟧
sqr₁: pr11 π₁ · pr11 f = pr11 π₂ · pr11 g
H₁: isPullback sqr₁
sqr₂: pr21 π₁ · pr21 f = pr21 π₂ · pr21 g
H₂: isPullback sqr₂
sqr₃: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
P₁:= make_Pullback sqr₁ H₁: Pullback (pr11 f) (pr11 g)
P₂:= make_Pullback sqr₂ H₂: Pullback (pr21 f) (pr21 g)

h₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
p: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
pr11 (isPullback_iso_comma_mor · π₂) = pr11 h₂

C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
pb, x, y, z: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
π₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ pb, y ⟧
sqr₁: pr11 π₁ · pr11 f = pr11 π₂ · pr11 g
H₁: isPullback sqr₁
sqr₂: pr21 π₁ · pr21 f = pr21 π₂ · pr21 g
H₂: isPullback sqr₂
sqr₃: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
P₁:= make_Pullback sqr₁ H₁: Pullback (pr11 f) (pr11 g)
P₂:= make_Pullback sqr₂ H₂: Pullback (pr21 f) (pr21 g)

h₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
p: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
pr11 (isPullback_iso_comma_mor · π₂) = pr11 h₂
 apply (PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 P₁).
          
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
pb, x, y, z: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧

pr21 (isPullback_iso_comma_mor · π₂) = pr21 h₂
 apply (PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 P₂).
        Qed.
      End UMP.

sqr₂: pr21 π₁ · pr21 f = pr21 π₂ · pr21 g

f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧

H₁: isPullback sqr₁
sqr₂: pr21 π₁ · pr21 f = pr21 π₂ · pr21 g

C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
pb, x, y, z: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
π₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ pb, y ⟧
sqr₁: pr11 π₁ · pr11 f = pr11 π₂ · pr11 g
H₁: isPullback sqr₁
sqr₂: pr21 π₁ · pr21 f = pr21 π₂ · pr21 g
H₂: isPullback sqr₂
sqr₃: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
P₁:= make_Pullback sqr₁ H₁: Pullback (pr11 f) (pr11 g)
P₂:= make_Pullback sqr₂ H₂: Pullback (pr21 f) (pr21 g)
w: iso_comma F G
h₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
p: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
∃! hk : iso_comma F G ⟦ w, pb ⟧,
hk · π₁ = h₁ × hk · π₂ = h₂

        
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
pb, x, y, z: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
π₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ pb, y ⟧
sqr₁: pr11 π₁ · pr11 f = pr11 π₂ · pr11 g
H₁: isPullback sqr₁
sqr₂: pr21 π₁ · pr21 f = pr21 π₂ · pr21 g
H₂: isPullback sqr₂

P₂:= make_Pullback sqr₂ H₂: Pullback (pr21 f) (pr21 g)
w: iso_comma F G
h₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
p: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
isaprop
  (∑ hk : iso_comma F G ⟦ w, pb ⟧,
   hk · π₁ = h₁ × hk · π₂ = h₂)

C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
pb, x, y, z: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
π₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ pb, y ⟧
sqr₁: pr11 π₁ · pr11 f = pr11 π₂ · pr11 g
H₁: isPullback sqr₁
sqr₂: pr21 π₁ · pr21 f = pr21 π₂ · pr21 g
H₂: isPullback sqr₂

P₂:= make_Pullback sqr₂ H₂: Pullback (pr21 f) (pr21 g)

h₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
p: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
isaprop
  (∑ hk : iso_comma F G ⟦ w, pb ⟧,
   hk · π₁ = h₁ × hk · π₂ = h₂)
 apply isPullback_iso_comma_unique.

?pr1 · π₁ = h₁

F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃

HG: preserves_pullback G

f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧

π₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ pb, y ⟧
sqr₁: pr11 π₁ · pr11 f = pr11 π₂ · pr11 g
H₁: isPullback sqr₁
sqr₂: pr21 π₁ · pr21 f = pr21 π₂ · pr21 g

h₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
p: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
(λ _ : ?pr1 · π₁ = h₁, ?pr1 · π₂ = h₂) ?pr10

          
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
pb, x, y, z: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
π₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ pb, y ⟧
sqr₁: pr11 π₁ · pr11 f = pr11 π₂ · pr11 g
H₁: isPullback sqr₁
sqr₂: pr21 π₁ · pr21 f = pr21 π₂ · pr21 g
H₂: isPullback sqr₂
sqr₃: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
P₁:= make_Pullback sqr₁ H₁: Pullback (pr11 f) (pr11 g)
P₂:= make_Pullback sqr₂ H₂: Pullback (pr21 f) (pr21 g)
w: iso_comma F G
h₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
p: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
iso_comma F G ⟦ w, pb ⟧
 exact (isPullback_iso_comma_mor h₁ h₂ p).
          
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
pb, x, y, z: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
π₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ pb, y ⟧
sqr₁: pr11 π₁ · pr11 f = pr11 π₂ · pr11 g
H₁: isPullback sqr₁
sqr₂: pr21 π₁ · pr21 f = pr21 π₂ · pr21 g
H₂: isPullback sqr₂
sqr₃: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
P₁:= make_Pullback sqr₁ H₁: Pullback (pr11 f) (pr11 g)
P₂:= make_Pullback sqr₂ H₂: Pullback (pr21 f) (pr21 g)
w: iso_comma F G
h₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
p: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
isPullback_iso_comma_mor h₁ h₂ p · π₁ = h₁
 exact (isPullback_iso_comma_mor_pr1 h₁ h₂ p).
          
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
pb, x, y, z: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
π₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ pb, y ⟧
sqr₁: pr11 π₁ · pr11 f = pr11 π₂ · pr11 g
H₁: isPullback sqr₁
sqr₂: pr21 π₁ · pr21 f = pr21 π₂ · pr21 g
H₂: isPullback sqr₂
sqr₃: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
P₁:= make_Pullback sqr₁ H₁: Pullback (pr11 f) (pr11 g)
P₂:= make_Pullback sqr₂ H₂: Pullback (pr21 f) (pr21 g)
w: iso_comma F G
h₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ w, y ⟧
p: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
(λ _ : isPullback_iso_comma_mor h₁ h₂ p · π₁ = h₁,
 isPullback_iso_comma_mor h₁ h₂ p · π₂ = h₂)
  (isPullback_iso_comma_mor_pr1 h₁ h₂ p)
 exact (isPullback_iso_comma_mor_pr2 h₁ h₂ p).
      Defined.
    End IsPullbackIsoComma.

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
HC₁: Pullbacks C₁
HC₂: Pullbacks C₂
Pullbacks (iso_comma F G)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
HC₁: Pullbacks C₁
HC₂: Pullbacks C₂
Pullbacks (iso_comma F G)

HC₂: Pullbacks C₂

f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧

G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G

HC₂: Pullbacks C₂

g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
(λ _ : iso_comma F G ⟦ ?pr1, x ⟧,
 iso_comma F G ⟦ ?pr1, y ⟧) ?pr10
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
HC₁: Pullbacks C₁
HC₂: Pullbacks C₂
z, x, y: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr12 (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2) · f =
pr22 (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2) · g
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
HC₁: Pullbacks C₁
HC₂: Pullbacks C₂
z, x, y: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
(λ H : pr12 (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2) · f =
       pr22 (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2) · g, isPullback H)
  ?pr11

HC₂: Pullbacks C₂
z, x, y: iso_comma F G

g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
iso_comma F G

(λ _ : C₁, C₂) ?pr11

F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃

HG: preserves_pullback G
HC₁: Pullbacks C₁
HC₂: Pullbacks C₂
z, x, y: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
(λ x : PrecategoryBinProduct.category_binproduct C₁ C₂,
 Core.ob_disp
   (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
      (Core.disp_cat_data_from_disp_cat
         (iso_comma_disp_cat F G))) x) (?pr11,, ?pr21)

F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
HC₁: Pullbacks C₁
HC₂: Pullbacks C₂
z, x, y: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
C₁
 exact (PullbackObject (HC₁ _ _ _ (pr11 f) (pr11 g))).
        
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G

HC₂: Pullbacks C₂

f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
(λ _ : C₁, C₂)
  (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 f) (pr11 g))
 exact (PullbackObject (HC₂ _ _ _ (pr21 f) (pr21 g))).

G: C₂ ⟶ C₃

HC₂: Pullbacks C₂

(λ x : PrecategoryBinProduct.category_binproduct C₁ C₂,
 Core.ob_disp
   (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
      (Core.disp_cat_data_from_disp_cat
         (iso_comma_disp_cat F G))) x)
  (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 f) (pr11 g),,
   HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 f) (pr21 g))
 
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
HC₁: Pullbacks C₁
HC₂: Pullbacks C₂
z, x, y: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
# F
  (PullbackPr1
     (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 f) (pr11 g)))
· # F (pr11 f) =
# F
  (PullbackPr2
     (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 f) (pr11 g)))
· # F (pr11 g)

f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
# G
  (PullbackPr1
     (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))
· # G (pr21 f) =
# G
  (PullbackPr2
     (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))
· # G (pr21 g)

z_iso (F (pr11 x)) (G (pr21 x))

C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
HC₁: Pullbacks C₁
HC₂: Pullbacks C₂
z, x, y: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
# F
  (PullbackPr1
     (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 f) (pr11 g)))
· # F (pr11 f) =
# F
  (PullbackPr2
     (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 f) (pr11 g)))
· # F (pr11 g)
 abstract
              (rewrite <- !functor_comp ;
               apply maponpaths ;
               apply PullbackSqrCommutes).
          
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
HC₁: Pullbacks C₁
HC₂: Pullbacks C₂

f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
# G
  (PullbackPr1
     (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))
· # G (pr21 f) =
# G
  (PullbackPr2
     (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))
· # G (pr21 g)
 abstract
              (rewrite <- !functor_comp ;
               apply maponpaths ;
               apply PullbackSqrCommutes).

G: C₂ ⟶ C₃

HC₂: Pullbacks C₂

f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
z_iso (F (pr11 x)) (G (pr21 x))
 exact (pr2 x).

 exact (pr2 y).

C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
HC₁: Pullbacks C₁
HC₂: Pullbacks C₂
z, x, y: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr2 x · # G (pr21 f) = # F (pr11 f) · pr2 z
 exact (!(pr2 f)).
          
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
HC₁: Pullbacks C₁
HC₂: Pullbacks C₂
z, x, y: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr2 y · # G (pr21 g) = # F (pr11 g) · pr2 z
 exact (!(pr2 g)).
      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
HC₁: Pullbacks C₁
HC₂: Pullbacks C₂
z, x, y: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
iso_comma F G
⟦ (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 f) (pr11 g),,
   HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 f) (pr21 g)),,
  iso_between_pullbacks
    (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof HC₁ z x y f g)
    (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof0 HC₂ z x y f g)
    (HF (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
       (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 f)
          (pr11 g)) (pr11 f) (pr11 g)
       (PullbackPr1
          (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 f)
             (pr11 g)))
       (PullbackPr2
          (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 f)
             (pr11 g)))
       (PullbackSqrCommutes
          (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 f)
             (pr11 g)))
       (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof HC₁ z x y f g)
       (isPullback_Pullback
          (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 f)
             (pr11 g))))
    (HG (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
       (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 f)
          (pr21 g)) (pr21 f) (pr21 g)
       (PullbackPr1
          (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 f)
             (pr21 g)))
       (PullbackPr2
          (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 f)
             (pr21 g)))
       (PullbackSqrCommutes
          (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 f)
             (pr21 g)))
       (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof0 HC₂ z x y f g)
       (isPullback_Pullback
          (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 f)
             (pr21 g)))) (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
    (! pr2 f) (! pr2 g), x ⟧
 
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
HC₁: Pullbacks C₁
HC₂: Pullbacks C₂
z, x, y: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
C₁
⟦ pr11 ((HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 f)
           (pr11 g),,
         HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 f)
           (pr21 g)),,
        iso_between_pullbacks
          (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof HC₁ z x y f
             g)
          (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof0 HC₂ z x y
             f g)
          (HF (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
             (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 f)
                (pr11 g)) (pr11 f) (pr11 g)
             (PullbackPr1
                (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                   (pr11 f) (pr11 g)))
             (PullbackPr2
                (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                   (pr11 f) (pr11 g)))
             (PullbackSqrCommutes
                (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                   (pr11 f) (pr11 g)))
             (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof HC₁ z x
                y f g)
             (isPullback_Pullback
                (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                   (pr11 f) (pr11 g))))
          (HG (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
             (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 f)
                (pr21 g)) (pr21 f) (pr21 g)
             (PullbackPr1
                (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                   (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))
             (PullbackPr2
                (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                   (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))
             (PullbackSqrCommutes
                (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                   (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))
             (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof0 HC₂ z x
                y f g)
             (isPullback_Pullback
                (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                   (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))) (pr2 x)
          (pr2 y) (pr2 z) (! pr2 f) (! pr2 g)), pr11 x
⟧
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
HC₁: Pullbacks C₁
HC₂: Pullbacks C₂
z, x, y: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
(λ _ : C₁
       ⟦ pr11 ((HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                  (pr11 f) (pr11 g),,
                HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                  (pr21 f) (pr21 g)),,
               iso_between_pullbacks
                 (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof HC₁
                    z x y f g)
                 (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof0 HC₂
                    z x y f g)
                 (HF (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
                    (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                       (pr11 f) (pr11 g)) (pr11 f)
                    (pr11 g)
                    (PullbackPr1
                       (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                          (pr11 f) (pr11 g)))
                    (PullbackPr2
                       (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                          (pr11 f) (pr11 g)))
                    (PullbackSqrCommutes
                       (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                          (pr11 f) (pr11 g)))
                    (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof
                       HC₁ z x y f g)
                    (isPullback_Pullback
                       (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                          (pr11 f) (pr11 g))))
                 (HG (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
                    (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                       (pr21 f) (pr21 g)) (pr21 f)
                    (pr21 g)
                    (PullbackPr1
                       (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                          (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))
                    (PullbackPr2
                       (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                          (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))
                    (PullbackSqrCommutes
                       (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                          (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))
                    (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof0
                       HC₂ z x y f g)
                    (isPullback_Pullback
                       (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                          (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))) (pr2 x)
                 (pr2 y) (pr2 z) (! pr2 f) (! pr2 g)),
       pr11 x ⟧,
 C₂
 ⟦ pr21 ((HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 f)
            (pr11 g),,
          HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 f)
            (pr21 g)),,
         iso_between_pullbacks
           (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof HC₁ z x y
              f g)
           (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof0 HC₂ z x y
              f g)
           (HF (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
              (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 f)
                 (pr11 g)) (pr11 f) (pr11 g)
              (PullbackPr1
                 (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                    (pr11 f) (pr11 g)))
              (PullbackPr2
                 (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                    (pr11 f) (pr11 g)))
              (PullbackSqrCommutes
                 (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                    (pr11 f) (pr11 g)))
              (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof HC₁ z x
                 y f g)
              (isPullback_Pullback
                 (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                    (pr11 f) (pr11 g))))
           (HG (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
              (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 f)
                 (pr21 g)) (pr21 f) (pr21 g)
              (PullbackPr1
                 (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                    (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))
              (PullbackPr2
                 (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                    (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))
              (PullbackSqrCommutes
                 (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                    (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))
              (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof0 HC₂ z
                 x y f g)
              (isPullback_Pullback
                 (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                    (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))) (pr2 x)
           (pr2 y) (pr2 z) (! pr2 f) (! pr2 g)),
 pr21 x ⟧) ?pr10
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
HC₁: Pullbacks C₁
HC₂: Pullbacks C₂
z, x, y: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
(λ f0 : PrecategoryBinProduct.category_binproduct C₁
          C₂
        ⟦ pr1
            ((HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 f)
                (pr11 g),,
              HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 f)
                (pr21 g)),,
             iso_between_pullbacks
               (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof HC₁ z
                  x y f g)
               (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof0 HC₂ z
                  x y f g)
               (HF (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
                  (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                     (pr11 f) (pr11 g)) (pr11 f)
                  (pr11 g)
                  (PullbackPr1
                     (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                        (pr11 f) (pr11 g)))
                  (PullbackPr2
                     (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                        (pr11 f) (pr11 g)))
                  (PullbackSqrCommutes
                     (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                        (pr11 f) (pr11 g)))
                  (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof HC₁
                     z x y f g)
                  (isPullback_Pullback
                     (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                        (pr11 f) (pr11 g))))
               (HG (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
                  (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                     (pr21 f) (pr21 g)) (pr21 f)
                  (pr21 g)
                  (PullbackPr1
                     (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                        (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))
                  (PullbackPr2
                     (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                        (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))
                  (PullbackSqrCommutes
                     (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                        (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))
                  (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof0
                     HC₂ z x y f g)
                  (isPullback_Pullback
                     (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                        (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))) (pr2 x)
               (pr2 y) (pr2 z) (! pr2 f) (! pr2 g)),
        pr1 x ⟧,
 Core.mor_disp
   (pr2
      ((HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 f)
          (pr11 g),,
        HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 f)
          (pr21 g)),,
       iso_between_pullbacks
         (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof HC₁ z x y f
            g)
         (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof0 HC₂ z x y f
            g)
         (HF (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
            (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 f)
               (pr11 g)) (pr11 f) (pr11 g)
            (PullbackPr1
               (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                  (pr11 f) (pr11 g)))
            (PullbackPr2
               (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                  (pr11 f) (pr11 g)))
            (PullbackSqrCommutes
               (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                  (pr11 f) (pr11 g)))
            (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof HC₁ z x y

                  (pr11 f) (pr11 g))))

            (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 f)

               y f g)
            (isPullback_Pullback
               (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                  (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)
         (pr2 z) (! pr2 f) (! pr2 g))) (pr2 x) f0)
  (?pr10,, ?pr21)

        
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
HC₁: Pullbacks C₁
HC₂: Pullbacks C₂
z, x, y: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
C₁
⟦ pr11 ((HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 f)
           (pr11 g),,
         HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 f)
           (pr21 g)),,
        iso_between_pullbacks
          (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof HC₁ z x y f
             g)
          (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof0 HC₂ z x y
             f g)
          (HF (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
             (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 f)
                (pr11 g)) (pr11 f) (pr11 g)
             (PullbackPr1
                (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                   (pr11 f) (pr11 g)))
             (PullbackPr2
                (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                   (pr11 f) (pr11 g)))
             (PullbackSqrCommutes
                (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                   (pr11 f) (pr11 g)))
             (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof HC₁ z x
                y f g)
             (isPullback_Pullback
                (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                   (pr11 f) (pr11 g))))
          (HG (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
             (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 f)
                (pr21 g)) (pr21 f) (pr21 g)
             (PullbackPr1
                (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                   (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))
             (PullbackPr2
                (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                   (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))
             (PullbackSqrCommutes
                (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                   (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))
             (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof0 HC₂ z x
                y f g)
             (isPullback_Pullback
                (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                   (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))) (pr2 x)
          (pr2 y) (pr2 z) (! pr2 f) (! pr2 g)), pr11 x
⟧
 apply PullbackPr1.
        
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G

HC₂: Pullbacks C₂
z, x, y: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
(λ _ : C₁
       ⟦ pr11 ((HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                  (pr11 f) (pr11 g),,
                HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                  (pr21 f) (pr21 g)),,
               iso_between_pullbacks
                 (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof HC₁
                    z x y f g)
                 (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof0 HC₂
                    z x y f g)
                 (HF (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
                    (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                       (pr11 f) (pr11 g)) (pr11 f)
                    (pr11 g)
                    (PullbackPr1
                       (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                          (pr11 f) (pr11 g)))
                    (PullbackPr2
                       (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                          (pr11 f) (pr11 g)))
                    (PullbackSqrCommutes
                       (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                          (pr11 f) (pr11 g)))
                    (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof
                       HC₁ z x y f g)
                    (isPullback_Pullback
                       (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                          (pr11 f) (pr11 g))))
                 (HG (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
                    (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                       (pr21 f) (pr21 g)) (pr21 f)
                    (pr21 g)
                    (PullbackPr1
                       (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                          (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))
                    (PullbackPr2
                       (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                          (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))
                    (PullbackSqrCommutes
                       (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                          (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))
                    (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof0
                       HC₂ z x y f g)
                    (isPullback_Pullback
                       (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                          (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))) (pr2 x)
                 (pr2 y) (pr2 z) (! pr2 f) (! pr2 g)),
       pr11 x ⟧,
 C₂
 ⟦ pr21 ((HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 f)
            (pr11 g),,
          HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 f)
            (pr21 g)),,
         iso_between_pullbacks
           (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof HC₁ z x y
              f g)
           (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof0 HC₂ z x y
              f g)
           (HF (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
              (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 f)
                 (pr11 g)) (pr11 f) (pr11 g)
              (PullbackPr1
                 (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                    (pr11 f) (pr11 g)))
              (PullbackPr2
                 (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                    (pr11 f) (pr11 g)))
              (PullbackSqrCommutes
                 (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                    (pr11 f) (pr11 g)))
              (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof HC₁ z x
                 y f g)
              (isPullback_Pullback
                 (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                    (pr11 f) (pr11 g))))
           (HG (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
              (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 f)
                 (pr21 g)) (pr21 f) (pr21 g)
              (PullbackPr1
                 (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                    (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))
              (PullbackPr2
                 (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                    (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))
              (PullbackSqrCommutes
                 (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                    (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))
              (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof0 HC₂ z
                 x y f g)
              (isPullback_Pullback
                 (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                    (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))) (pr2 x)
           (pr2 y) (pr2 z) (! pr2 f) (! pr2 g)),
 pr21 x ⟧)
  (PullbackPr1
     (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 f) (pr11 g)))
 apply PullbackPr1.
        
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
HC₁: Pullbacks C₁
HC₂: Pullbacks C₂
z, x, y: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
(λ f0 : PrecategoryBinProduct.category_binproduct C₁
          C₂
        ⟦ pr1
            ((HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 f)
                (pr11 g),,
              HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 f)
                (pr21 g)),,
             iso_between_pullbacks
               (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof HC₁ z
                  x y f g)
               (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof0 HC₂ z
                  x y f g)
               (HF (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
                  (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                     (pr11 f) (pr11 g)) (pr11 f)
                  (pr11 g)
                  (PullbackPr1
                     (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                        (pr11 f) (pr11 g)))
                  (PullbackPr2
                     (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                        (pr11 f) (pr11 g)))
                  (PullbackSqrCommutes
                     (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                        (pr11 f) (pr11 g)))
                  (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof HC₁
                     z x y f g)
                  (isPullback_Pullback
                     (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                        (pr11 f) (pr11 g))))
               (HG (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
                  (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                     (pr21 f) (pr21 g)) (pr21 f)
                  (pr21 g)
                  (PullbackPr1
                     (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                        (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))
                  (PullbackPr2
                     (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                        (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))
                  (PullbackSqrCommutes
                     (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                        (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))
                  (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof0
                     HC₂ z x y f g)
                  (isPullback_Pullback
                     (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                        (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))) (pr2 x)
               (pr2 y) (pr2 z) (! pr2 f) (! pr2 g)),
        pr1 x ⟧,
 Core.mor_disp
   (pr2
      ((HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 f)
          (pr11 g),,
        HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 f)
          (pr21 g)),,
       iso_between_pullbacks
         (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof HC₁ z x y f
            g)
         (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof0 HC₂ z x y f
            g)
         (HF (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
            (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 f)
               (pr11 g)) (pr11 f) (pr11 g)
            (PullbackPr1

            (PullbackPr2

            (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 f)

            (PullbackPr1

                  (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))
            (PullbackPr2

         (pr2 z) (! pr2 f) (! pr2 g))) (pr2 x) f0)
  (PullbackPr1
     (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 f) (pr11 g)),,
   PullbackPr1
     (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))

            (cbn ; unfold iso_between_pullbacks_map ;
             refine (!_) ;
             apply (PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1
                      (make_Pullback
                         _
                         (HG _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
                            (isPullback_Pullback (HC₂ _ _ _ (pr21 f) (pr21 g))))))).
      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
HC₁: Pullbacks C₁
HC₂: Pullbacks C₂
z, x, y: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
(λ _ : iso_comma F G
       ⟦ (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 f)
            (pr11 g),,
          HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 f)
            (pr21 g)),,
         iso_between_pullbacks
           (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof HC₁ z x y
              f g)
           (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof0 HC₂ z x y
              f g)
           (HF (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
              (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 f)
                 (pr11 g)) (pr11 f) (pr11 g)

                    (pr11 f) (pr11 g)))

                    (pr11 f) (pr11 g)))
              (PullbackSqrCommutes

                    (pr11 f) (pr11 g)))
              (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof HC₁ z x
                 y f g)
              (isPullback_Pullback

                    (pr11 f) (pr11 g))))
           (HG (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
              (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 f)
                 (pr21 g)) (pr21 f) (pr21 g)
              (PullbackPr1
                 (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                    (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))
              (PullbackPr2
                 (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                    (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))
              (PullbackSqrCommutes
                 (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                    (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))
              (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof0 HC₂ z
                 x y f g)
              (isPullback_Pullback
                 (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                    (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))) (pr2 x)
           (pr2 y) (pr2 z) (! pr2 f) (! pr2 g), x ⟧,
 iso_comma F G
 ⟦ (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 f) (pr11 g),,
    HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 f) (pr21 g)),,
   iso_between_pullbacks
     (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof HC₁ z x y f g)
     (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof0 HC₂ z x y f g)
     (HF (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
        (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 f)
           (pr11 g)) (pr11 f) (pr11 g)
        (PullbackPr1
           (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 f)
              (pr11 g)))
        (PullbackPr2
           (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 f)
              (pr11 g)))
        (PullbackSqrCommutes
           (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 f)
              (pr11 g)))
        (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof HC₁ z x y f g)
        (isPullback_Pullback
           (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 f)
              (pr11 g))))
     (HG (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
        (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 f)
           (pr21 g)) (pr21 f) (pr21 g)
        (PullbackPr1
           (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 f)
              (pr21 g)))
        (PullbackPr2
           (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 f)
              (pr21 g)))
        (PullbackSqrCommutes
           (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 f)
              (pr21 g)))
        (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof0 HC₂ z x y f
           g)
        (isPullback_Pullback
           (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 f)
              (pr21 g)))) (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
     (! pr2 f) (! pr2 g), y ⟧)
  ((PullbackPr1
      (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 f)
         (pr11 g)),,
    PullbackPr1
      (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 f)
         (pr21 g))),,
   pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof1 HC₁ HC₂ z x y f g)
 
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
HC₁: Pullbacks C₁
HC₂: Pullbacks C₂
z, x, y: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
C₁
⟦ pr11 ((HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 f)
           (pr11 g),,
         HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 f)
           (pr21 g)),,
        iso_between_pullbacks
          (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof HC₁ z x y f
             g)
          (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof0 HC₂ z x y
             f g)
          (HF (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
             (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 f)
                (pr11 g)) (pr11 f) (pr11 g)
             (PullbackPr1
                (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                   (pr11 f) (pr11 g)))
             (PullbackPr2
                (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                   (pr11 f) (pr11 g)))
             (PullbackSqrCommutes
                (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                   (pr11 f) (pr11 g)))
             (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof HC₁ z x
                y f g)
             (isPullback_Pullback
                (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                   (pr11 f) (pr11 g))))
          (HG (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
             (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 f)
                (pr21 g)) (pr21 f) (pr21 g)
             (PullbackPr1
                (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                   (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))
             (PullbackPr2
                (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                   (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))
             (PullbackSqrCommutes
                (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                   (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))
             (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof0 HC₂ z x
                y f g)
             (isPullback_Pullback
                (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                   (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))) (pr2 x)
          (pr2 y) (pr2 z) (! pr2 f) (! pr2 g)), pr11 y
⟧
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
HC₁: Pullbacks C₁
HC₂: Pullbacks C₂
z, x, y: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
(λ _ : C₁
       ⟦ pr11 ((HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                  (pr11 f) (pr11 g),,
                HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                  (pr21 f) (pr21 g)),,
               iso_between_pullbacks
                 (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof HC₁
                    z x y f g)
                 (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof0 HC₂
                    z x y f g)
                 (HF (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
                    (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                       (pr11 f) (pr11 g)) (pr11 f)
                    (pr11 g)
                    (PullbackPr1
                       (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                          (pr11 f) (pr11 g)))

                    (pr21 g)

 ⟦ pr21 ((HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 f)

G: C₂ ⟶ C₃

g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
(λ f0 : PrecategoryBinProduct.category_binproduct C₁

        ⟦ pr1
            ((HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 f)
                (pr11 g),,

                        (pr11 f) (pr11 g)))

                  (isPullback_Pullback

                        (pr11 f) (pr11 g))))
               (HG (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
                  (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                     (pr21 f) (pr21 g)) (pr21 f)
                  (pr21 g)
                  (PullbackPr1
                     (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                        (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))
                  (PullbackPr2
                     (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                        (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))
                  (PullbackSqrCommutes

                     HC₂ z x y f g)

                        (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))) (pr2 x)

   (pr2
      ((HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 f)

         (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 f)
            (pr11 g)),,
       PullbackPr2
         (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 f)
            (pr21 g))),,
      pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof2 HC₁ HC₂ z x y f
        g) · f =
pr22 (((HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 f)
          (pr11 g),,
        HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 f)
          (pr21 g)),,
       iso_between_pullbacks
         (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof HC₁ z x y f
            g)

            g)

            (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 f)

               (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                  (pr11 f) (pr11 g)))

                  (pr11 f) (pr11 g)))

                  (pr11 f) (pr11 g)))

               f g)

               (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                  (pr11 f) (pr11 g))))
         (HG (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
            (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 f)
               (pr21 g)) (pr21 f) (pr21 g)

               (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                  (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))
            (PullbackPr2
               (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                  (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))
            (PullbackSqrCommutes
               (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                  (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))

               y f g)
            (isPullback_Pullback
               (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                  (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)
         (pr2 z) (! pr2 f) (! pr2 g)),,
      ((PullbackPr1
          (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 f)
             (pr11 g)),,
        PullbackPr1
          (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 f)
             (pr21 g))),,
       pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof1 HC₁ HC₂ z x y
         f g),,
      (PullbackPr2
         (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 f)
            (pr11 g)),,

         (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 f)
            (pr21 g))),,
      pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof2 HC₁ HC₂ z x y f
        g) · g
 abstract
          (use eq_iso_comma_mor ; cbn ;
           [ apply PullbackSqrCommutes
           | apply PullbackSqrCommutes ]).

F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃

g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧

                 (pr11 g),,
               HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 f)
                 (pr21 g)),,
              iso_between_pullbacks
                (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof HC₁ z
                   x y f g)
                (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof0 HC₂
                   z x y f g)
                (HF (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
                   (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                      (pr11 f) (pr11 g)) (pr11 f)
                   (pr11 g)

                      (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                         (pr11 f) (pr11 g)))
                   (PullbackPr2
                      (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                         (pr11 f) (pr11 g)))

                         (pr11 f) (pr11 g)))

                      HC₁ z x y f g)
                   (isPullback_Pullback

                         (pr11 f) (pr11 g))))
                (HG (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
                   (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                      (pr21 f) (pr21 g)) (pr21 f)
                   (pr21 g)

                      (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                         (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))
                   (PullbackPr2

                         (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))

                      HC₂ z x y f g)
                   (isPullback_Pullback
                      (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                         (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))) (pr2 x)
                (pr2 y) (pr2 z) (! pr2 f) (! pr2 g)),,
             ((PullbackPr1
                 (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                    (pr11 f) (pr11 g)),,

                    (pr21 f) (pr21 g))),,

                z x y f g),,

                (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                   (pr11 f) (pr11 g)),,
              PullbackPr2
                (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                   (pr21 f) (pr21 g))),,
             pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof2 HC₁ HC₂
               z x y f g) · f =
       pr22 (((HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 f)
                 (pr11 g),,
               HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 f)
                 (pr21 g)),,
              iso_between_pullbacks
                (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof HC₁ z
                   x y f g)

                   z x y f g)

               z x y f g) · g, isPullback H)

         (((HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 f)

             (HG (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
                (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                   (pr21 f) (pr21 g)) (pr21 f)
                (pr21 g)
                (PullbackPr1
                   (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                      (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))
                (PullbackPr2
                   (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                      (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))
                (PullbackSqrCommutes
                   (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                      (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))
                (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof0 HC₂
                   z x y f g)
                (isPullback_Pullback
                   (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                      (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))) (pr2 x)
             (pr2 y) (pr2 z) (! pr2 f) (! pr2 g)),,
          ((PullbackPr1
              (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 f)
                 (pr11 g)),,
            PullbackPr1
              (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 f)
                 (pr21 g))),,
           pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof1 HC₁ HC₂ z
             x y f g),,
          (PullbackPr2
             (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 f)
                (pr11 g)),,
           PullbackPr2
             (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 f)
                (pr21 g))),,
          pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof2 HC₁ HC₂ z x
            y f g)) · pr11 f =
pr112 (pr2
         (((HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 f)
              (pr11 g),,
            HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 f)
              (pr21 g)),,
           iso_between_pullbacks
             (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof HC₁ z x
                y f g)
             (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof0 HC₂ z x
                y f g)
             (HF (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
                (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                   (pr11 f) (pr11 g)) (pr11 f)
                (pr11 g)
                (PullbackPr1
                   (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                      (pr11 f) (pr11 g)))
                (PullbackPr2
                   (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                      (pr11 f) (pr11 g)))
                (PullbackSqrCommutes
                   (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                      (pr11 f) (pr11 g)))
                (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof HC₁ z
                   x y f g)
                (isPullback_Pullback
                   (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                      (pr11 f) (pr11 g))))
             (HG (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
                (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                   (pr21 f) (pr21 g)) (pr21 f)
                (pr21 g)
                (PullbackPr1
                   (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                      (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))
                (PullbackPr2
                   (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                      (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))
                (PullbackSqrCommutes
                   (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                      (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))
                (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof0 HC₂
                   z x y f g)
                (isPullback_Pullback
                   (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                      (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))) (pr2 x)
             (pr2 y) (pr2 z) (! pr2 f) (! pr2 g)),,
          ((PullbackPr1
              (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 f)
                 (pr11 g)),,
            PullbackPr1
              (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 f)
                 (pr21 g))),,
           pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof1 HC₁ HC₂ z
             x y f g),,
          (PullbackPr2
             (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 f)
                (pr11 g)),,
           PullbackPr2
             (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 f)
                (pr21 g))),,
          pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof2 HC₁ HC₂ z x
            y f g)) · pr11 g
 apply PullbackSqrCommutes.
        
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
HC₁: Pullbacks C₁
HC₂: Pullbacks C₂
z, x, y: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
isPullback
  (PullbackSqrCommutes
     (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 f) (pr11 g)))
 apply isPullback_Pullback.
        
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
HC₁: Pullbacks C₁
HC₂: Pullbacks C₂
z, x, y: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr211 (pr2
         (((HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 f)
              (pr11 g),,
            HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 f)
              (pr21 g)),,
           iso_between_pullbacks
             (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof HC₁ z x
                y f g)
             (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof0 HC₂ z x
                y f g)
             (HF (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
                (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                   (pr11 f) (pr11 g)) (pr11 f)
                (pr11 g)
                (PullbackPr1
                   (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                      (pr11 f) (pr11 g)))
                (PullbackPr2
                   (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                      (pr11 f) (pr11 g)))
                (PullbackSqrCommutes
                   (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                      (pr11 f) (pr11 g)))
                (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof HC₁ z
                   x y f g)
                (isPullback_Pullback
                   (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                      (pr11 f) (pr11 g))))
             (HG (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
                (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                   (pr21 f) (pr21 g)) (pr21 f)
                (pr21 g)
                (PullbackPr1
                   (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                      (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))
                (PullbackPr2
                   (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                      (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))
                (PullbackSqrCommutes
                   (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                      (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))
                (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof0 HC₂
                   z x y f g)
                (isPullback_Pullback
                   (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                      (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))) (pr2 x)
             (pr2 y) (pr2 z) (! pr2 f) (! pr2 g)),,
          ((PullbackPr1
              (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 f)
                 (pr11 g)),,
            PullbackPr1
              (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 f)
                 (pr21 g))),,
           pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof1 HC₁ HC₂ z
             x y f g),,
          (PullbackPr2
             (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 f)
                (pr11 g)),,
           PullbackPr2
             (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 f)
                (pr21 g))),,
          pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof2 HC₁ HC₂ z x
            y f g)) · pr21 f =
pr212 (pr2
         (((HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 f)
              (pr11 g),,
            HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 f)
              (pr21 g)),,
           iso_between_pullbacks
             (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof HC₁ z x
                y f g)
             (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof0 HC₂ z x
                y f g)
             (HF (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
                (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)

                (pr11 g)

                   (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)

                   x y f g)
                (isPullback_Pullback
                   (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
                      (pr11 f) (pr11 g))))
             (HG (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
                (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                   (pr21 f) (pr21 g)) (pr21 f)
                (pr21 g)
                (PullbackPr1
                   (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                      (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))
                (PullbackPr2
                   (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                      (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))
                (PullbackSqrCommutes
                   (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
                      (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))
                (pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof0 HC₂
                   z x y f g)

             (pr2 y) (pr2 z) (! pr2 f) (! pr2 g)),,
          ((PullbackPr1
              (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 f)
                 (pr11 g)),,
            PullbackPr1
              (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 f)
                 (pr21 g))),,
           pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof1 HC₁ HC₂ z
             x y f g),,
          (PullbackPr2
             (HC₁ (pr11 z) (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 f)
                (pr11 g)),,
           PullbackPr2
             (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 f)
                (pr21 g))),,
          pullbacks_in_iso_comma_subproof2 HC₁ HC₂ z x
            y f g)) · pr21 g
 apply PullbackSqrCommutes.
        
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
HC₁: Pullbacks C₁
HC₂: Pullbacks C₂
z, x, y: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
isPullback
  (PullbackSqrCommutes
     (HC₂ (pr21 z) (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))
 apply isPullback_Pullback.
    Defined.

HC₂: Pullbacks C₂

     C₁ (pullbacks_in_iso_comma HC₁ HC₂)

G: C₂ ⟶ C₃

C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
C₀: category
H₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
HH₁: preserves_pullback H₁
H₂: C₀ ⟶ C₂
HH₂: preserves_pullback H₂
α: nat_z_iso (H₁ ∙ F) (H₂ ∙ G)
w, x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ w, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
π₁: C₀ ⟦ z, w ⟧
π₂: C₀ ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₁: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
p₂: # (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α) π₁
· # (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α) f =
# (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α) π₂
· # (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α) g
H: isPullback p₁
isPullback p₂

      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
C₀: category
H₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
HH₁: preserves_pullback H₁
H₂: C₀ ⟶ C₂
HH₂: preserves_pullback H₂
α: nat_z_iso (H₁ ∙ F) (H₂ ∙ G)
w, x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ w, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
π₁: C₀ ⟦ z, w ⟧
π₂: C₀ ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₁: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
p₂: # (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α) π₁
· # (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α) f =
# (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α) π₂
· # (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α) g
H: isPullback p₁
# H₁ π₁ · # H₁ f = # H₁ π₂ · # H₁ g
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
C₀: category
H₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
HH₁: preserves_pullback H₁
H₂: C₀ ⟶ C₂
HH₂: preserves_pullback H₂
α: nat_z_iso (H₁ ∙ F) (H₂ ∙ G)
w, x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ w, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
π₁: C₀ ⟦ z, w ⟧
π₂: C₀ ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₁: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
p₂: # (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α) π₁
· # (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α) f =
# (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α) π₂
· # (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α) g
H: isPullback p₁
isPullback ?Goal
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
C₀: category
H₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
HH₁: preserves_pullback H₁
H₂: C₀ ⟶ C₂
HH₂: preserves_pullback H₂
α: nat_z_iso (H₁ ∙ F) (H₂ ∙ G)
w, x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ w, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
π₁: C₀ ⟦ z, w ⟧
π₂: C₀ ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₁: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
p₂: # (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α) π₁
· # (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α) f =
# (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α) π₂
· # (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α) g
H: isPullback p₁
# H₂ π₁ · # H₂ f = # H₂ π₂ · # H₂ g
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
C₀: category
H₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
HH₁: preserves_pullback H₁
H₂: C₀ ⟶ C₂
HH₂: preserves_pullback H₂
α: nat_z_iso (H₁ ∙ F) (H₂ ∙ G)
w, x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ w, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
π₁: C₀ ⟦ z, w ⟧
π₂: C₀ ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₁: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
p₂: # (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α) π₁
· # (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α) f =
# (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α) π₂
· # (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α) g
H: isPullback p₁
isPullback ?Goal1

      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
C₀: category
H₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
HH₁: preserves_pullback H₁
H₂: C₀ ⟶ C₂
HH₂: preserves_pullback H₂
α: nat_z_iso (H₁ ∙ F) (H₂ ∙ G)
w, x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ w, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
π₁: C₀ ⟦ z, w ⟧
π₂: C₀ ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₁: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
p₂: # (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α) π₁
· # (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α) f =
# (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α) π₂
· # (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α) g
H: isPullback p₁
# H₁ π₁ · # H₁ f = # H₁ π₂ · # H₁ g
 abstract
          (rewrite <- !functor_comp ;
           apply maponpaths ;
           exact p₁).
      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
C₀: category
H₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
HH₁: preserves_pullback H₁
H₂: C₀ ⟶ C₂
HH₂: preserves_pullback H₂
α: nat_z_iso (H₁ ∙ F) (H₂ ∙ G)
w, x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ w, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
π₁: C₀ ⟦ z, w ⟧
π₂: C₀ ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₁: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
p₂: # (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α) π₁
· # (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α) f =
# (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α) π₂
· # (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α) g
H: isPullback p₁
isPullback
  (iso_comma_ump1_preserves_pullback_subproof C₀ H₁ w
     x y z f g π₁ π₂ p₁)
 exact (HH₁ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ H).
      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
C₀: category
H₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
HH₁: preserves_pullback H₁
H₂: C₀ ⟶ C₂
HH₂: preserves_pullback H₂
α: nat_z_iso (H₁ ∙ F) (H₂ ∙ G)
w, x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ w, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
π₁: C₀ ⟦ z, w ⟧
π₂: C₀ ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₁: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
p₂: # (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α) π₁
· # (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α) f =
# (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α) π₂
· # (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α) g
H: isPullback p₁
# H₂ π₁ · # H₂ f = # H₂ π₂ · # H₂ g
 abstract
          (rewrite <- !functor_comp ;
           apply maponpaths ;
           exact p₁).
      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
C₀: category
H₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
HH₁: preserves_pullback H₁
H₂: C₀ ⟶ C₂
HH₂: preserves_pullback H₂
α: nat_z_iso (H₁ ∙ F) (H₂ ∙ G)
w, x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ w, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
π₁: C₀ ⟦ z, w ⟧
π₂: C₀ ⟦ z, x ⟧

p₂: # (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α) π₁
· # (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α) f =
# (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α) π₂
· # (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α) g
H: isPullback p₁
isPullback
  (iso_comma_ump1_preserves_pullback_subproof0 C₀ H₂ w
     x y z f g π₁ π₂ p₁)
 exact (HH₂ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ H).
    Defined.
  End Pullbacks.

  (**
   4. Initial objects
   *)
  Section InitialObject.
    Context (HF : preserves_initial F)
            (HG : preserves_initial G).

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_initial F
HG: preserves_initial G
x: iso_comma F G
H₁: isInitial C₁ (pr11 x)
H₂: isInitial C₂ (pr21 x)
isInitial (iso_comma F G) x

G: C₂ ⟶ C₃

H₂: isInitial C₂ (pr21 x)

HG: preserves_initial G

H₁: isInitial C₁ (pr11 x)
H₂: isInitial C₂ (pr21 x)

iscontr (iso_comma F G ⟦ x, w ⟧)

H₂: isInitial C₂ (pr21 x)

H₂: isInitial C₂ (pr21 x)

C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_initial F
HG: preserves_initial G
x: iso_comma F G
H₁: isInitial C₁ (pr11 x)
H₂: isInitial C₂ (pr21 x)
w: iso_comma F G
isaprop (iso_comma F G ⟦ x, w ⟧)
 abstract
          (use invproofirrelevance ;
           intros φ₁ φ₂ ;
           use eq_iso_comma_mor ;
           [ apply (@InitialArrowEq _ (make_Initial _ H₁))
           | apply (@InitialArrowEq _ (make_Initial _ H₂)) ]).
      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_initial F
HG: preserves_initial G
x: iso_comma F G
H₁: isInitial C₁ (pr11 x)
H₂: isInitial C₂ (pr21 x)
w: iso_comma F G
iso_comma F G ⟦ x, w ⟧
 
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_initial F
HG: preserves_initial G
x: iso_comma F G
H₁: isInitial C₁ (pr11 x)
H₂: isInitial C₂ (pr21 x)
w: iso_comma F G
Core.mor_disp (pr2 x) (pr2 w)
  (InitialArrow (pr11 x,, H₁) (pr11 w),,
   InitialArrow (pr21 x,, H₂) (pr21 w))

        apply (@InitialArrowEq _ (make_Initial _ (HF _ H₁))).
    Defined.

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_initial F
HG: preserves_initial G
I₁: Initial C₁
I₂: Initial C₂
Initial (iso_comma F G)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_initial F
HG: preserves_initial G
I₁: Initial C₁
I₂: Initial C₂
Initial (iso_comma F G)

      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_initial F
HG: preserves_initial G
I₁: Initial C₁
I₂: Initial C₂
iso_comma F G

F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_initial F
HG: preserves_initial G
I₁: Initial C₁
I₂: Initial C₂
(λ a : iso_comma F G, isInitial (iso_comma F G) a)
  ?pr1

      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃

HG: preserves_initial G
I₁: Initial C₁
I₂: Initial C₂
iso_comma F G
 
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_initial F
HG: preserves_initial G
I₁: Initial C₁
I₂: Initial C₂
z_iso (F (pr1 I₁)) (G (pr1 I₂))

        exact (ziso_Initials
                 (make_Initial _ (HF _ (pr2 I₁)))
                 (make_Initial _ (HG _ (pr2 I₂)))).
      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_initial F
HG: preserves_initial G
I₁: Initial C₁
I₂: Initial C₂
(λ a : iso_comma F G, isInitial (iso_comma F G) a)
  ((pr1 I₁,, pr1 I₂),,
   (ziso_Initials
      (make_Initial (F (pr1 I₁))
         (HF (pr1 I₁) (pr2 I₁)))
      (make_Initial (G (pr1 I₂))
         (HG (pr1 I₂) (pr2 I₂)))
    :
    Core.ob_disp
      (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
         (Core.disp_cat_data_from_disp_cat
            (iso_comma_disp_cat F G)))
      (pr1 I₁,, pr1 I₂)))
 
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_initial F
HG: preserves_initial G
I₁: Initial C₁
I₂: Initial C₂
isInitial C₁
  (pr11 ((pr1 I₁,, pr1 I₂),,
         ziso_Initials
           (make_Initial (F (pr1 I₁))
              (HF (pr1 I₁) (pr2 I₁)))
           (make_Initial (G (pr1 I₂))
              (HG (pr1 I₂) (pr2 I₂)))))

G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_initial F
HG: preserves_initial G
I₁: Initial C₁
I₂: Initial C₂
isInitial C₂
  (pr21 ((pr1 I₁,, pr1 I₂),,
         ziso_Initials
           (make_Initial (F (pr1 I₁))
              (HF (pr1 I₁) (pr2 I₁)))
           (make_Initial (G (pr1 I₂))
              (HG (pr1 I₂) (pr2 I₂)))))

isInitial C₁
  (pr11 ((pr1 I₁,, pr1 I₂),,
         ziso_Initials
           (make_Initial (F (pr1 I₁))
              (HF (pr1 I₁) (pr2 I₁)))
           (make_Initial (G (pr1 I₂))
              (HG (pr1 I₂) (pr2 I₂)))))
 exact (pr2 I₁).

G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_initial F
HG: preserves_initial G
I₁: Initial C₁
I₂: Initial C₂
isInitial C₂
  (pr21 ((pr1 I₁,, pr1 I₂),,
         ziso_Initials
           (make_Initial (F (pr1 I₁))
              (HF (pr1 I₁) (pr2 I₁)))
           (make_Initial (G (pr1 I₂))
              (HG (pr1 I₂) (pr2 I₂)))))
 exact (pr2 I₂).
    Defined.

F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_initial F
HG: preserves_initial G
I₁: Initial C₁
I₂: Initial C₂

HF: preserves_initial F

HG: preserves_initial G
I₁: Initial C₁
I₂: Initial C₂
preserves_chosen_initial
  (initial_category_iso_comma I₁ I₂)
  (iso_comma_pr1 F G)

      exact (pr2 I₁).
    Defined.

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category

G: C₂ ⟶ C₃

HG: preserves_initial G

I₂: Initial C₂

HG: preserves_initial G
I₁: Initial C₁
I₂: Initial C₂
preserves_chosen_initial
  (initial_category_iso_comma I₁ I₂)
  (iso_comma_pr2 F G)

      exact (pr2 I₂).

C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_initial F
HG: preserves_initial G

HH₁: preserves_initial H₁
H₂: C₀ ⟶ C₂

preserves_initial (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α)

G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_initial F
HG: preserves_initial G

α: nat_z_iso (H₁ ∙ F) (H₂ ∙ G)

G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_initial F
HG: preserves_initial G

H₂: C₀ ⟶ C₂
HH₂: preserves_initial H₂

  (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α x)

x: C₀

G: C₂ ⟶ C₃

G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_initial F
HG: preserves_initial G

G: C₂ ⟶ C₃

HG: preserves_initial G

G: C₂ ⟶ C₃

HG: preserves_initial G

H₂: C₀ ⟶ C₂

Hx: isInitial C₀ x
isInitial C₀ x

        exact Hx.
    Defined.
  End InitialObject.

  (**
   5. Coproducts
   *)
  Section Coproduct.
    Context (HF : preserves_bincoproduct F)
            (HG : preserves_bincoproduct G).

    Section IsCoproductInIsoComma.
      Context {x y z : iso_comma F G}
              (i₁ : x --> z)
              (i₂ : y --> z)
              (H₁ : isBinCoproduct _ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z) (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂))
              (H₂ : isBinCoproduct _ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z) (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂)).

      Let P₁ : BinCoproduct (pr11 x) (pr11 y) := make_BinCoproduct _ _ _ _ _ _ H₁.
      Let P₂ : BinCoproduct (pr21 x) (pr21 y) := make_BinCoproduct _ _ _ _ _ _ H₂.

      Section UMP.
        Context {w : iso_comma F G}
                (f : x --> w)
                (g : y --> w).

        
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
i₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
i₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
H₁: isBinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂)
H₂: isBinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂)
P₁:= make_BinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂) H₁: BinCoproduct (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂) H₂: BinCoproduct (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, w ⟧
isaprop
  (∑ fg : iso_comma F G ⟦ z, w ⟧,
   i₁ · fg = f × i₂ · fg = g)

        
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
i₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
i₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
H₁: isBinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂)
H₂: isBinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂)
P₁:= make_BinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂) H₁: BinCoproduct (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂) H₂: BinCoproduct (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, w ⟧
isaprop
  (∑ fg : iso_comma F G ⟦ z, w ⟧,
   i₁ · fg = f × i₂ · fg = g)

          
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
i₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
i₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
H₁: isBinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂)
H₂: isBinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂)
P₁:= make_BinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂) H₁: BinCoproduct (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂) H₂: BinCoproduct (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, w ⟧
isProofIrrelevant
  (∑ fg : iso_comma F G ⟦ z, w ⟧,
   i₁ · fg = f × i₂ · fg = g)

          
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
i₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
i₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
H₁: isBinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂)
H₂: isBinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂)
P₁:= make_BinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂) H₁: BinCoproduct (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂) H₂: BinCoproduct (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ fg : iso_comma F G ⟦ z, w ⟧,
i₁ · fg = f × i₂ · fg = g
φ₁ = φ₂

          
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
i₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
i₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
H₁: isBinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂)
H₂: isBinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂)
P₁:= make_BinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂) H₁: BinCoproduct (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂) H₂: BinCoproduct (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ fg : iso_comma F G ⟦ z, w ⟧,
i₁ · fg = f × i₂ · fg = g
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : iso_comma F G ⟦ z, w ⟧,
   i₁ · x0 = f × i₂ · x0 = g)
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
i₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
i₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
H₁: isBinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂)
H₂: isBinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂)
P₁:= make_BinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)

w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ fg : iso_comma F G ⟦ z, w ⟧,
i₁ · fg = f × i₂ · fg = g
pr1 φ₁ = pr1 φ₂

F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G

i₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧

  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂)

  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂)
