f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ fg : iso_comma F G ⟦ z, w ⟧,
i₁ · fg = f × i₂ · fg = g
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : iso_comma F G ⟦ z, w ⟧,
   i₁ · x0 = f × i₂ · x0 = g)

            
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
i₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
i₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
H₁: isBinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂)
H₂: isBinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂)
P₁:= make_BinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂) H₁: BinCoproduct (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂) H₂: BinCoproduct (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ fg : iso_comma F G ⟦ z, w ⟧,
i₁ · fg = f × i₂ · fg = g
x0: iso_comma F G ⟦ z, w ⟧
isaprop (i₁ · x0 = f × i₂ · x0 = g)

            apply isapropdirprod ; apply homset_property.

C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
i₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
i₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
H₁: isBinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂)
H₂: isBinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂)
P₁:= make_BinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂) H₁: BinCoproduct (pr11 x) (pr11 y)

f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ fg : iso_comma F G ⟦ z, w ⟧,
i₁ · fg = f × i₂ · fg = g
BinCoproductIn1 P₁ · pr111 φ₁ =
BinCoproductIn1 P₁ · pr111 φ₂

F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃

C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
i₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
i₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
H₁: isBinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂)
H₂: isBinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂)
P₁:= make_BinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂) H₁: BinCoproduct (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂) H₂: BinCoproduct (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ fg : iso_comma F G ⟦ z, w ⟧,
i₁ · fg = f × i₂ · fg = g
BinCoproductIn1 P₁ · pr111 φ₁ =
BinCoproductIn1 P₁ · pr111 φ₂
 exact (maponpaths (λ z, pr11 z) (pr12 φ₁)
                     @ !(maponpaths (λ z, pr11 z) (pr12 φ₂))).

F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃

HG: preserves_bincoproduct G

f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, w ⟧

φ₁, φ₂: ∑ fg : iso_comma F G ⟦ z, w ⟧,
i₁ · fg = f × i₂ · fg = g
BinCoproductIn2 P₁ · pr111 φ₁ =
BinCoproductIn2 P₁ · pr111 φ₂
 exact (maponpaths (λ z, pr11 z) (pr22 φ₁)
                     @ !(maponpaths (λ z, pr11 z) (pr22 φ₂))).

F: C₁ ⟶ C₃

HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G

i₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
i₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
H₁: isBinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂)
H₂: isBinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂)
P₁:= make_BinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂) H₁: BinCoproduct (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂) H₂: BinCoproduct (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ fg : iso_comma F G ⟦ z, w ⟧,
i₁ · fg = f × i₂ · fg = g
BinCoproductIn1 P₂ · pr211 φ₁ =
BinCoproductIn1 P₂ · pr211 φ₂

HG: preserves_bincoproduct G

H₂: isBinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂)

w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ fg : iso_comma F G ⟦ z, w ⟧,
i₁ · fg = f × i₂ · fg = g
BinCoproductIn1 P₂ · pr211 φ₁ =
BinCoproductIn1 P₂ · pr211 φ₂
 exact (maponpaths (λ z, dirprod_pr2 (pr1 z)) (pr12 φ₁)
                     @ !(maponpaths (λ z, dirprod_pr2 (pr1 z)) (pr12 φ₂))).
            
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G

i₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧

  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂)
H₂: isBinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂)

BinCoproductIn2 P₂ · pr211 φ₂
 exact (maponpaths (λ z, dirprod_pr2 (pr1 z)) (pr22 φ₁)
                     @ !(maponpaths (λ z, dirprod_pr2 (pr1 z)) (pr22 φ₂))).

HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G

· (# F (BinCoproductArrow P₁ (pr11 f) (pr11 g))
   · pr2 w) =

· (pr2 z
   · # G (BinCoproductArrow P₂ (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))

F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G

· (# F (BinCoproductArrow P₁ (pr11 f) (pr11 g))
   · pr2 w) =

· (pr2 z
   · # G (BinCoproductArrow P₂ (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))

            
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
i₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
i₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
H₁: isBinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂)
H₂: isBinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂)
P₁:= make_BinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂) H₁: BinCoproduct (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂) H₂: BinCoproduct (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, w ⟧
# F (pr11 i₁)
· (# F (BinCoproductArrow P₁ (pr11 f) (pr11 g))
   · pr2 w) =
# F (pr11 i₁)
· (pr2 z
   · # G (BinCoproductArrow P₂ (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))
 abstract
                (rewrite !assoc ;
                 rewrite <- functor_comp ;
                 rewrite (BinCoproductIn1Commutes _ _ _ P₁) ;
                 refine (pr2 f @ _) ;
                 refine (_ @ maponpaths (λ z, z · _) (!(pr2 i₁))) ;
                 rewrite !assoc' ;
                 apply maponpaths ;
                 rewrite <- functor_comp ;
                 apply maponpaths ;
                 refine (!_) ;
                 apply (BinCoproductIn1Commutes _ _ _ P₂)).
            
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
i₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
i₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
H₁: isBinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂)
H₂: isBinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂)
P₁:= make_BinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂) H₁: BinCoproduct (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂) H₂: BinCoproduct (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, w ⟧
# F (pr11 i₂)
· (# F (BinCoproductArrow P₁ (pr11 f) (pr11 g))
   · pr2 w) =
# F (pr11 i₂)
· (pr2 z
   · # G (BinCoproductArrow P₂ (pr21 f) (pr21 g)))
 abstract
                (rewrite !assoc ;
                 rewrite <- functor_comp ;
                 rewrite (BinCoproductIn2Commutes _ _ _ P₁) ;
                 refine (pr2 g @ _) ;
                 refine (_ @ maponpaths (λ z, z · _) (!(pr2 i₂))) ;
                 rewrite !assoc' ;
                 apply maponpaths ;
                 rewrite <- functor_comp ;
                 apply maponpaths ;
                 refine (!_) ;
                 apply (BinCoproductIn2Commutes _ _ _ P₂)).
        Defined.

        
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
i₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
i₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
H₁: isBinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂)
H₂: isBinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂)
P₁:= make_BinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂) H₁: BinCoproduct (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂) H₂: BinCoproduct (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, w ⟧
i₁ · isBinCoproduct_in_iso_comma_ump = f

  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂)

  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂) H₁: BinCoproduct (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂) H₂: BinCoproduct (pr21 x) (pr21 y)

f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, w ⟧
i₁ · isBinCoproduct_in_iso_comma_ump = f

          
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
i₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
i₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
H₁: isBinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂)
H₂: isBinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂)
P₁:= make_BinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂) H₁: BinCoproduct (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂) H₂: BinCoproduct (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, w ⟧
pr11 i₁ · BinCoproductArrow P₁ (pr11 f) (pr11 g) =
pr11 f

F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
i₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
i₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
H₁: isBinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂)
H₂: isBinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂)
P₁:= make_BinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂) H₁: BinCoproduct (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂) H₂: BinCoproduct (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, w ⟧
pr21 i₁ · BinCoproductArrow P₂ (pr21 f) (pr21 g) =
pr21 f

          
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
i₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
i₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
H₁: isBinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂)
H₂: isBinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂)
P₁:= make_BinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂) H₁: BinCoproduct (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂) H₂: BinCoproduct (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, w ⟧
pr11 i₁ · BinCoproductArrow P₁ (pr11 f) (pr11 g) =
pr11 f
 apply (BinCoproductIn1Commutes _ _ _ P₁).
          
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
i₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
i₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
H₁: isBinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂)
H₂: isBinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂)
P₁:= make_BinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂) H₁: BinCoproduct (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂) H₂: BinCoproduct (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, w ⟧
pr21 i₁ · BinCoproductArrow P₂ (pr21 f) (pr21 g) =
pr21 f
 apply (BinCoproductIn1Commutes _ _ _ P₂).
        Qed.

C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
i₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
i₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
H₁: isBinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂)
H₂: isBinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂)
P₁:= make_BinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂) H₁: BinCoproduct (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂) H₂: BinCoproduct (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, w ⟧
pr11 i₂ · BinCoproductArrow P₁ (pr11 f) (pr11 g) =
pr11 g
 apply (BinCoproductIn2Commutes _ _ _ P₁).
          
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
i₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
i₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
H₁: isBinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂)
H₂: isBinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂)
P₁:= make_BinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂) H₁: BinCoproduct (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂) H₂: BinCoproduct (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, w ⟧
pr21 i₂ · BinCoproductArrow P₂ (pr21 f) (pr21 g) =
pr21 g
 apply (BinCoproductIn2Commutes _ _ _ P₂).
        Qed.
      End UMP.

      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
i₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
i₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
H₁: isBinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂)
H₂: isBinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂)
P₁:= make_BinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂) H₁: BinCoproduct (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂) H₂: BinCoproduct (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
isBinCoproduct (iso_comma F G) x y z i₁ i₂

      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
i₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
i₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
H₁: isBinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂)
H₂: isBinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂)
P₁:= make_BinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂) H₁: BinCoproduct (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂) H₂: BinCoproduct (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
isBinCoproduct (iso_comma F G) x y z i₁ i₂

        
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
i₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
i₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
H₁: isBinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂)
H₂: isBinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂)
P₁:= make_BinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂) H₁: BinCoproduct (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂) H₂: BinCoproduct (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, w ⟧
∃! fg : iso_comma F G ⟦ z, w ⟧,
i₁ · fg = f × i₂ · fg = g

        
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
i₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
i₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
H₁: isBinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂)
H₂: isBinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂)
P₁:= make_BinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂) H₁: BinCoproduct (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂) H₂: BinCoproduct (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, w ⟧
isaprop
  (∑ fg : iso_comma F G ⟦ z, w ⟧,
   i₁ · fg = f × i₂ · fg = g)
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
i₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
i₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
H₁: isBinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂)
H₂: isBinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂)
P₁:= make_BinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂) H₁: BinCoproduct (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂) H₂: BinCoproduct (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, w ⟧
∑ fg : iso_comma F G ⟦ z, w ⟧,
i₁ · fg = f × i₂ · fg = g

        
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
i₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
i₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
H₁: isBinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂)
H₂: isBinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂)
P₁:= make_BinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂) H₁: BinCoproduct (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂) H₂: BinCoproduct (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, w ⟧
isaprop
  (∑ fg : iso_comma F G ⟦ z, w ⟧,
   i₁ · fg = f × i₂ · fg = g)
 exact (isBinCoproduct_in_iso_comma_unique f g).
        
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃

  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂) H₂: BinCoproduct (pr21 x) (pr21 y)

f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, w ⟧
∑ fg : iso_comma F G ⟦ z, w ⟧,
i₁ · fg = f × i₂ · fg = g

  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂) H₁: BinCoproduct (pr11 x) (pr11 y)

  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂) H₂: BinCoproduct (pr21 x) (pr21 y)

g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, w ⟧
iso_comma F G ⟦ z, w ⟧
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
i₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
i₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
H₁: isBinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂)
H₂: isBinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂)
P₁:= make_BinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂) H₁: BinCoproduct (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂) H₂: BinCoproduct (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, w ⟧
i₁ · ?pr1 = f
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
i₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
i₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
H₁: isBinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂)
H₂: isBinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂)
P₁:= make_BinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂) H₁: BinCoproduct (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂) H₂: BinCoproduct (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, w ⟧
(λ _ : i₁ · ?pr1 = f, i₂ · ?pr1 = g) ?pr10

          
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
i₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
i₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
H₁: isBinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂)
H₂: isBinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂)
P₁:= make_BinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂) H₁: BinCoproduct (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂) H₂: BinCoproduct (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, w ⟧
iso_comma F G ⟦ z, w ⟧
 exact (isBinCoproduct_in_iso_comma_ump f g).
          
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
i₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
i₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
H₁: isBinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂)
H₂: isBinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂)
P₁:= make_BinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂) H₁: BinCoproduct (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂) H₂: BinCoproduct (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, w ⟧
i₁ · isBinCoproduct_in_iso_comma_ump f g = f
 exact (isBinCoproduct_in_iso_comma_ump_in1 f g).
          
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
x, y, z: iso_comma F G
i₁: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, z ⟧
i₂: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, z ⟧
H₁: isBinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂)
H₂: isBinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂)
P₁:= make_BinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (pr11 z)
  (pr11 i₁) (pr11 i₂) H₁: BinCoproduct (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
P₂:= make_BinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (pr21 z)
  (pr21 i₁) (pr21 i₂) H₂: BinCoproduct (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
w: iso_comma F G
f: iso_comma F G ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: iso_comma F G ⟦ y, w ⟧
(λ _ : i₁ · isBinCoproduct_in_iso_comma_ump f g = f,
 i₂ · isBinCoproduct_in_iso_comma_ump f g = g)
  (isBinCoproduct_in_iso_comma_ump_in1 f g)
 exact (isBinCoproduct_in_iso_comma_ump_in2 f g).
      Defined.
    End IsCoproductInIsoComma.

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
HC₁: BinCoproducts C₁
HC₂: BinCoproducts C₂
BinCoproducts (iso_comma F G)

F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃

HG: preserves_bincoproduct G

HC₂: BinCoproducts C₂

C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
HC₁: BinCoproducts C₁
HC₂: BinCoproducts C₂
x, y: iso_comma F G
FP:= make_BinCoproduct C₃ (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
  (F (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
  (# F (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (# F (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (HF (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))
     (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C₁
        (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))): BinCoproduct (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
BinCoproduct x y

(λ _ : C₁, C₂) ?pr1

F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃

        (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))): BinCoproduct (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
(λ x : PrecategoryBinProduct.category_binproduct C₁ C₂,
 Core.ob_disp
   (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
      (Core.disp_cat_data_from_disp_cat
         (iso_comma_disp_cat F G))) x) (?pr1,, ?pr2)

        
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
HC₁: BinCoproducts C₁
HC₂: BinCoproducts C₂
x, y: iso_comma F G
FP:= make_BinCoproduct C₃ (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
  (F (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
  (# F (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (# F (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (HF (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))
     (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C₁
        (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))): BinCoproduct (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
GP:= make_BinCoproduct C₃ (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
  (G (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
  (# G (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))
  (# G (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))
  (HG (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))
     (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C₂
        (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))): BinCoproduct (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
C₁
 exact (BinCoproductObject (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))).
        
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
HC₁: BinCoproducts C₁
HC₂: BinCoproducts C₂
x, y: iso_comma F G
FP:= make_BinCoproduct C₃ (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
  (F (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
  (# F (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (# F (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (HF (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))
     (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))

        (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))): BinCoproduct (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
GP:= make_BinCoproduct C₃ (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
  (G (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
  (# G (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))
  (# G (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))
  (HG (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))
     (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C₂
        (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))): BinCoproduct (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
(λ _ : C₁, C₂) (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))
 exact (BinCoproductObject (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))).

F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃

     (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))

  (G (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
  (# G (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))
  (# G (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))

     (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C₂
        (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))): BinCoproduct (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
(λ x : PrecategoryBinProduct.category_binproduct C₁ C₂,
 Core.ob_disp
   (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
      (Core.disp_cat_data_from_disp_cat
         (iso_comma_disp_cat F G))) x)
  (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y),, HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))
 exact (bincoproduct_of_z_iso FP GP (pr2 x) (pr2 y)).

F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G

HC₂: BinCoproducts C₂
x, y: iso_comma F G
FP:= make_BinCoproduct C₃ (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
  (F (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
  (# F (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (# F (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (HF (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))
     (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))

GP:= make_BinCoproduct C₃ (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))

     (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C₂
        (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))): BinCoproduct (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
iso_comma F G ⟦ x,
(HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y),, HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)),,
bincoproduct_of_z_iso FP GP (pr2 x) (pr2 y) ⟧

F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃

     (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C₂
        (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))): BinCoproduct (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
(λ _ : C₁ ⟦ pr11 x,
       pr11 ((HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y),,
              HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)),,
             bincoproduct_of_z_iso FP GP (pr2 x)
               (pr2 y)) ⟧,
 C₂ ⟦ pr21 x,
 pr21 ((HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y),, HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)),,
       bincoproduct_of_z_iso FP GP (pr2 x) (pr2 y)) ⟧)
  ?pr1
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
HC₁: BinCoproducts C₁
HC₂: BinCoproducts C₂
x, y: iso_comma F G
FP:= make_BinCoproduct C₃ (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
  (F (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
  (# F (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (# F (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (HF (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))
     (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C₁
        (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))): BinCoproduct (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
GP:= make_BinCoproduct C₃ (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
  (G (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
  (# G (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))
  (# G (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))
  (HG (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))
     (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C₂
        (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))): BinCoproduct (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
(λ f : PrecategoryBinProduct.category_binproduct C₁ C₂
       ⟦ pr1 x,
       pr1
         ((HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y),,
           HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)),,
          bincoproduct_of_z_iso FP GP (pr2 x) (pr2 y))
       ⟧,
 Core.mor_disp (pr2 x)
   (pr2
      ((HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y),, HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)),,
       bincoproduct_of_z_iso FP GP (pr2 x) (pr2 y))) f)
  (?pr1,, ?pr2)

F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G

HC₂: BinCoproducts C₂

  (F (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
  (# F (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (# F (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))

     (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))

GP:= make_BinCoproduct C₃ (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))

     (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C₂
        (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))): BinCoproduct (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
C₁ ⟦ pr11 x,
pr11 ((HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y),, HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)),,
      bincoproduct_of_z_iso FP GP (pr2 x) (pr2 y)) ⟧
 exact (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))).

F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃

(λ _ : C₁ ⟦ pr11 x,
       pr11 ((HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y),,
              HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)),,
             bincoproduct_of_z_iso FP GP (pr2 x)
               (pr2 y)) ⟧,
 C₂ ⟦ pr21 x,
 pr21 ((HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y),, HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)),,
       bincoproduct_of_z_iso FP GP (pr2 x) (pr2 y)) ⟧)
  (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
 exact (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))).

F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G

HC₂: BinCoproducts C₂
x, y: iso_comma F G
FP:= make_BinCoproduct C₃ (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))

        (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))): BinCoproduct (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
(λ f : PrecategoryBinProduct.category_binproduct C₁ C₂
       ⟦ pr1 x,
       pr1
         ((HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y),,
           HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)),,
          bincoproduct_of_z_iso FP GP (pr2 x) (pr2 y))
       ⟧,
 Core.mor_disp (pr2 x)
   (pr2
      ((HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y),, HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)),,
       bincoproduct_of_z_iso FP GP (pr2 x) (pr2 y))) f)
  (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)),,
   BinCoproductIn1 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
 exact ((BinCoproductOfArrowsIn1 _ FP GP (pr12 x) (pr12 y))).

iso_comma F G ⟦ y,
(HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y),, HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)),,
bincoproduct_of_z_iso FP GP (pr2 x) (pr2 y) ⟧

F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G

HC₂: BinCoproducts C₂

  (F (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))

     (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))

        (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))): BinCoproduct (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))

  (G (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
  (# G (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))

     (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C₂
        (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))): BinCoproduct (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
(λ _ : C₁ ⟦ pr11 y,
       pr11 ((HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y),,
              HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)),,
             bincoproduct_of_z_iso FP GP (pr2 x)
               (pr2 y)) ⟧,
 C₂ ⟦ pr21 y,
 pr21 ((HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y),, HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)),,
       bincoproduct_of_z_iso FP GP (pr2 x) (pr2 y)) ⟧)
  ?pr1
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
HC₁: BinCoproducts C₁
HC₂: BinCoproducts C₂
x, y: iso_comma F G
FP:= make_BinCoproduct C₃ (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
  (F (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
  (# F (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (# F (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (HF (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))
     (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C₁
        (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))): BinCoproduct (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
GP:= make_BinCoproduct C₃ (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
  (G (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
  (# G (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))
  (# G (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))
  (HG (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))
     (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C₂
        (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))): BinCoproduct (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
(λ f : PrecategoryBinProduct.category_binproduct C₁ C₂
       ⟦ pr1 y,
       pr1
         ((HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y),,
           HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)),,
          bincoproduct_of_z_iso FP GP (pr2 x) (pr2 y))
       ⟧,
 Core.mor_disp (pr2 y)
   (pr2
      ((HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y),, HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)),,
       bincoproduct_of_z_iso FP GP (pr2 x) (pr2 y))) f)
  (?pr1,, ?pr2)

        
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
HC₁: BinCoproducts C₁
HC₂: BinCoproducts C₂
x, y: iso_comma F G
FP:= make_BinCoproduct C₃ (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
  (F (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
  (# F (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (# F (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (HF (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))
     (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C₁
        (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))): BinCoproduct (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
GP:= make_BinCoproduct C₃ (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
  (G (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
  (# G (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))
  (# G (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))
  (HG (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))
     (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C₂
        (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))): BinCoproduct (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
C₁ ⟦ pr11 y,
pr11 ((HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y),, HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)),,
      bincoproduct_of_z_iso FP GP (pr2 x) (pr2 y)) ⟧
 exact (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))).
        
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
HC₁: BinCoproducts C₁
HC₂: BinCoproducts C₂
x, y: iso_comma F G
FP:= make_BinCoproduct C₃ (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
  (F (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
  (# F (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (# F (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (HF (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))
     (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C₁
        (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))): BinCoproduct (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
GP:= make_BinCoproduct C₃ (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
  (G (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
  (# G (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))
  (# G (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))
  (HG (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))
     (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C₂
        (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))): BinCoproduct (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
(λ _ : C₁ ⟦ pr11 y,
       pr11 ((HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y),,
              HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)),,
             bincoproduct_of_z_iso FP GP (pr2 x)
               (pr2 y)) ⟧,
 C₂ ⟦ pr21 y,
 pr21 ((HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y),, HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)),,
       bincoproduct_of_z_iso FP GP (pr2 x) (pr2 y)) ⟧)
  (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
 exact (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))).
        
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
HC₁: BinCoproducts C₁
HC₂: BinCoproducts C₂
x, y: iso_comma F G
FP:= make_BinCoproduct C₃ (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
  (F (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
  (# F (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (# F (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (HF (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))
     (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C₁
        (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))): BinCoproduct (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
GP:= make_BinCoproduct C₃ (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
  (G (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
  (# G (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))
  (# G (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))
  (HG (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))
     (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C₂
        (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))): BinCoproduct (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
(λ f : PrecategoryBinProduct.category_binproduct C₁ C₂
       ⟦ pr1 y,
       pr1
         ((HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y),,
           HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)),,
          bincoproduct_of_z_iso FP GP (pr2 x) (pr2 y))
       ⟧,
 Core.mor_disp (pr2 y)
   (pr2
      ((HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y),, HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)),,
       bincoproduct_of_z_iso FP GP (pr2 x) (pr2 y))) f)
  (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)),,
   BinCoproductIn2 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
 exact ((BinCoproductOfArrowsIn2 _ FP GP (pr12 x) (pr12 y))).
      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
HC₁: BinCoproducts C₁
HC₂: BinCoproducts C₂
x, y: iso_comma F G
FP:= make_BinCoproduct C₃ (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
  (F (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
  (# F (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (# F (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (HF (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))
     (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C₁
        (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))): BinCoproduct (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
GP:= make_BinCoproduct C₃ (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
  (G (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
  (# G (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))
  (# G (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))
  (HG (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))
     (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C₂
        (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))): BinCoproduct (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
isBinCoproduct (iso_comma F G) x y
  ((HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y),, HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)),,
   bincoproduct_of_z_iso FP GP (pr2 x) (pr2 y))
  ((BinCoproductIn1 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)),,
    BinCoproductIn1 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))),,
   BinCoproductOfArrowsIn1 C₃ FP GP (pr12 x) (pr12 y))
  ((BinCoproductIn2 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)),,
    BinCoproductIn2 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))),,
   BinCoproductOfArrowsIn2 C₃ FP GP (pr12 x) (pr12 y))
  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
HC₁: BinCoproducts C₁
HC₂: BinCoproducts C₂
x, y: iso_comma F G
FP:= make_BinCoproduct C₃ (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
  (F (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
  (# F (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (# F (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (HF (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))
     (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C₁
        (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))): BinCoproduct (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
GP:= make_BinCoproduct C₃ (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
  (G (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
  (# G (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))
  (# G (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))
  (HG (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))
     (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C₂
        (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))): BinCoproduct (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
isBinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
  (pr11 ((HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y),,
          HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)),,
         bincoproduct_of_z_iso FP GP (pr2 x) (pr2 y)))
  (pr11 ((BinCoproductIn1 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)),,
          BinCoproductIn1 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))),,
         BinCoproductOfArrowsIn1 C₃ FP GP (pr12 x)
           (pr12 y)))
  (pr11 ((BinCoproductIn2 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)),,
          BinCoproductIn2 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))),,
         BinCoproductOfArrowsIn2 C₃ FP GP (pr12 x)
           (pr12 y)))
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
HC₁: BinCoproducts C₁
HC₂: BinCoproducts C₂
x, y: iso_comma F G
FP:= make_BinCoproduct C₃ (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
  (F (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
  (# F (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (# F (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (HF (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))
     (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C₁
        (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))): BinCoproduct (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
GP:= make_BinCoproduct C₃ (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
  (G (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
  (# G (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))
  (# G (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))
  (HG (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))
     (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C₂
        (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))): BinCoproduct (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
isBinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
  (pr21 ((HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y),,
          HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)),,
         bincoproduct_of_z_iso FP GP (pr2 x) (pr2 y)))
  (pr21 ((BinCoproductIn1 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)),,
          BinCoproductIn1 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))),,
         BinCoproductOfArrowsIn1 C₃ FP GP (pr12 x)
           (pr12 y)))
  (pr21 ((BinCoproductIn2 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)),,
          BinCoproductIn2 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))),,
         BinCoproductOfArrowsIn2 C₃ FP GP (pr12 x)
           (pr12 y)))

         
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
HC₁: BinCoproducts C₁
HC₂: BinCoproducts C₂
x, y: iso_comma F G
FP:= make_BinCoproduct C₃ (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
  (F (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
  (# F (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (# F (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (HF (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))
     (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C₁
        (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))): BinCoproduct (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
GP:= make_BinCoproduct C₃ (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
  (G (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
  (# G (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))
  (# G (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))
  (HG (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))
     (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C₂
        (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))): BinCoproduct (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
isBinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
  (pr11 ((HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y),,
          HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)),,
         bincoproduct_of_z_iso FP GP (pr2 x) (pr2 y)))
  (pr11 ((BinCoproductIn1 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)),,
          BinCoproductIn1 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))),,
         BinCoproductOfArrowsIn1 C₃ FP GP (pr12 x)
           (pr12 y)))
  (pr11 ((BinCoproductIn2 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)),,
          BinCoproductIn2 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))),,
         BinCoproductOfArrowsIn2 C₃ FP GP (pr12 x)
           (pr12 y)))
 apply isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct.
         
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
HC₁: BinCoproducts C₁
HC₂: BinCoproducts C₂
x, y: iso_comma F G
FP:= make_BinCoproduct C₃ (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
  (F (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
  (# F (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (# F (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))))
  (HF (pr11 x) (pr11 y) (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))
     (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
     (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C₁
        (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))): BinCoproduct (F (pr11 x)) (F (pr11 y))
GP:= make_BinCoproduct C₃ (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
  (G (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
  (# G (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))
  (# G (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))))
  (HG (pr21 x) (pr21 y) (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))
     (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
     (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C₂
        (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))): BinCoproduct (G (pr21 x)) (G (pr21 y))
isBinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
  (pr21 ((HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y),,
          HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)),,
         bincoproduct_of_z_iso FP GP (pr2 x) (pr2 y)))
  (pr21 ((BinCoproductIn1 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)),,
          BinCoproductIn1 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))),,
         BinCoproductOfArrowsIn1 C₃ FP GP (pr12 x)
           (pr12 y)))
  (pr21 ((BinCoproductIn2 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)),,
          BinCoproductIn2 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))),,
         BinCoproductOfArrowsIn2 C₃ FP GP (pr12 x)
           (pr12 y)))
 apply isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct.
    Defined.

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
HC₁: BinCoproducts C₁
HC₂: BinCoproducts C₂
preserves_bincoproduct (iso_comma_pr1 F G)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
HC₁: BinCoproducts C₁
HC₂: BinCoproducts C₂
preserves_bincoproduct (iso_comma_pr1 F G)

      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
HC₁: BinCoproducts C₁
HC₂: BinCoproducts C₂
BinCoproducts (iso_comma F G)
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
HC₁: BinCoproducts C₁
HC₂: BinCoproducts C₂
preserves_chosen_bincoproduct ?HC₁ (iso_comma_pr1 F G)

      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
HC₁: BinCoproducts C₁
HC₂: BinCoproducts C₂

C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
HC₁: BinCoproducts C₁
HC₂: BinCoproducts C₂
BinCoproducts C₁
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
HC₁: BinCoproducts C₁
HC₂: BinCoproducts C₂
BinCoproducts C₂

        
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
HC₁: BinCoproducts C₁
HC₂: BinCoproducts C₂
BinCoproducts C₁
 exact HC₁.
        
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
HC₁: BinCoproducts C₁
HC₂: BinCoproducts C₂
BinCoproducts C₂
 exact HC₂.
      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
HC₁: BinCoproducts C₁
HC₂: BinCoproducts C₂
preserves_chosen_bincoproduct
  (bincoproducts_in_iso_comma HC₁ HC₂)
  (iso_comma_pr1 F G)
 
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
HC₁: BinCoproducts C₁
HC₂: BinCoproducts C₂
x, y: iso_comma F G
isBinCoproduct C₁ (iso_comma_pr1 F G x)
  (iso_comma_pr1 F G y)
  (iso_comma_pr1 F G
     (bincoproducts_in_iso_comma HC₁ HC₂ x y))
  (# (iso_comma_pr1 F G)
     (BinCoproductIn1
        (bincoproducts_in_iso_comma HC₁ HC₂ x y)))
  (# (iso_comma_pr1 F G)
     (BinCoproductIn2
        (bincoproducts_in_iso_comma HC₁ HC₂ x y)))

        
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
HC₁: BinCoproducts C₁
HC₂: BinCoproducts C₂
x, y: iso_comma F G
isBinCoproduct C₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)
  (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y))
  (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))
  (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₁ (pr11 x) (pr11 y)))

        apply isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct.
    Defined.

C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G

x, y: iso_comma F G
isBinCoproduct C₂ (iso_comma_pr2 F G x)
  (iso_comma_pr2 F G y)
  (iso_comma_pr2 F G
     (bincoproducts_in_iso_comma HC₁ HC₂ x y))
  (# (iso_comma_pr2 F G)
     (BinCoproductIn1
        (bincoproducts_in_iso_comma HC₁ HC₂ x y)))
  (# (iso_comma_pr2 F G)

HG: preserves_bincoproduct G

HC₂: BinCoproducts C₂
x, y: iso_comma F G
isBinCoproduct C₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
  (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y))
  (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))
  (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₂ (pr21 x) (pr21 y)))

        apply isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct.
    Defined.

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
C₀: category
H₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
HH₁: preserves_bincoproduct H₁
H₂: C₀ ⟶ C₂
HH₂: preserves_bincoproduct H₂
α: nat_z_iso (H₁ ∙ F) (H₂ ∙ G)
preserves_bincoproduct (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
C₀: category
H₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
HH₁: preserves_bincoproduct H₁
H₂: C₀ ⟶ C₂
HH₂: preserves_bincoproduct H₂
α: nat_z_iso (H₁ ∙ F) (H₂ ∙ G)
preserves_bincoproduct (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α)

      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
C₀: category
H₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
HH₁: preserves_bincoproduct H₁
H₂: C₀ ⟶ C₂
HH₂: preserves_bincoproduct H₂
α: nat_z_iso (H₁ ∙ F) (H₂ ∙ G)
x, y, z: C₀
π₁: C₀ ⟦ x, z ⟧
π₂: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hx: isBinCoproduct C₀ x y z π₁ π₂
isBinCoproduct (iso_comma F G)
  (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α x)
  (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α y)
  (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α z)
  (# (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α) π₁)
  (# (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α) π₂)

      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
C₀: category
H₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
HH₁: preserves_bincoproduct H₁
H₂: C₀ ⟶ C₂
HH₂: preserves_bincoproduct H₂
α: nat_z_iso (H₁ ∙ F) (H₂ ∙ G)
x, y, z: C₀
π₁: C₀ ⟦ x, z ⟧
π₂: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hx: isBinCoproduct C₀ x y z π₁ π₂
isBinCoproduct C₁
  (pr11 (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α x))
  (pr11 (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α y))
  (pr11 (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α z))
  (pr11 (# (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α) π₁))
  (pr11 (# (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α) π₂))
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
C₀: category
H₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
HH₁: preserves_bincoproduct H₁
H₂: C₀ ⟶ C₂
HH₂: preserves_bincoproduct H₂
α: nat_z_iso (H₁ ∙ F) (H₂ ∙ G)
x, y, z: C₀
π₁: C₀ ⟦ x, z ⟧
π₂: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hx: isBinCoproduct C₀ x y z π₁ π₂
isBinCoproduct C₂
  (pr21 (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α x))
  (pr21 (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α y))
  (pr21 (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α z))
  (pr21 (# (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α) π₁))
  (pr21 (# (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α) π₂))

      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
C₀: category
H₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
HH₁: preserves_bincoproduct H₁
H₂: C₀ ⟶ C₂
HH₂: preserves_bincoproduct H₂
α: nat_z_iso (H₁ ∙ F) (H₂ ∙ G)
x, y, z: C₀
π₁: C₀ ⟦ x, z ⟧
π₂: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hx: isBinCoproduct C₀ x y z π₁ π₂
isBinCoproduct C₁
  (pr11 (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α x))
  (pr11 (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α y))
  (pr11 (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α z))
  (pr11 (# (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α) π₁))
  (pr11 (# (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α) π₂))
 
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
C₀: category
H₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
HH₁: preserves_bincoproduct H₁
H₂: C₀ ⟶ C₂
HH₂: preserves_bincoproduct H₂
α: nat_z_iso (H₁ ∙ F) (H₂ ∙ G)
x, y, z: C₀
π₁: C₀ ⟦ x, z ⟧
π₂: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hx: isBinCoproduct C₀ x y z π₁ π₂
isBinCoproduct C₀ x y z π₁ π₂

        exact Hx.
      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
C₀: category
H₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
HH₁: preserves_bincoproduct H₁
H₂: C₀ ⟶ C₂
HH₂: preserves_bincoproduct H₂
α: nat_z_iso (H₁ ∙ F) (H₂ ∙ G)
x, y, z: C₀
π₁: C₀ ⟦ x, z ⟧
π₂: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hx: isBinCoproduct C₀ x y z π₁ π₂
isBinCoproduct C₂
  (pr21 (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α x))
  (pr21 (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α y))
  (pr21 (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α z))
  (pr21 (# (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α) π₁))
  (pr21 (# (iso_comma_ump1 F G H₁ H₂ α) π₂))
 
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
C₀: category
H₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
HH₁: preserves_bincoproduct H₁
H₂: C₀ ⟶ C₂
HH₂: preserves_bincoproduct H₂
α: nat_z_iso (H₁ ∙ F) (H₂ ∙ G)
x, y, z: C₀
π₁: C₀ ⟦ x, z ⟧
π₂: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hx: isBinCoproduct C₀ x y z π₁ π₂
isBinCoproduct C₀ x y z π₁ π₂

        exact Hx.
    Defined.
  End Coproduct.
End IsoCommaLimits.
